name: Mark Kelly
subject: Will you give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FgSSs4uA8pr8TtQDr2__eA-d3bBncua7lEDU3H0Dv5FSfHrx9F_INATb6E_WoAfZUZRaYxDoztrsz9SqJ4c-mRpjLQqYZC06nMbDvB5GG4qCwpkfvu2xooMEMStjDazAB_P4maLZUmnZOcErZl0rw9ut5nbDybe8JgkN0OqmmQbFJgIkPmYIDNwQwZeFHSR1m2QK-bdSWqOabETd4MTBnyudXkcpp-nV3i6s_QVqP01GTUKH1H4kGHIIxcUrdYvHEtuggpIq8gPf4eKyuC6Amzx9jZuaCP55vVcJIta170x6JS7ASWXE_RyccrwBB_MFBA/3ft/m-AixNYxSyCjMsrFkM9-fA/h0/LRf8LemGagmuxoFbDIOaFU6yP-RYAtETwn8GvUS3oBk)
Derek -

In just a moment, **[I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Common Good VA.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FgSSs4uA8pr8TtQDr2__eA_svsgxZvB_1PphP9oS2iR449w-pMP81RnVlG28nfKhuZItMV4-8kMdvqHR68630tuepKgldghNklqvBue-s4EuNhhi9qp8EBTFxIFW_lHk7sbKP3SBwZGNvxUBe0qbFnaWUa04vbjCEV7VElpEfOa5uDPfjiqo_XVdTqzqG5edtpENkjK-RJ5KaN8fyslAZIOj3VHDHFfyNUN8LHTFcC5fn02JFRTbWRwHhpB-conu6v-nuv1g_aML7rSkk1lLXbVK0BsZy2heFuj2AyrVf2ixICG50m9OmyN8X0bEjClIDQ/3ft/m-AixNYxSyCjMsrFkM9-fA/h1/Km0r3C1MTBcizqP6mlnnF2N4exM4fl-HnFQ_VBVCSRk)** Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

Here is the truth:

When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office.

Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona.

So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, **[I am asking you to split a $15 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA to help me fight back.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FkJmhslsbVYWrfMnPPpIGY70CY7zRliYWmMnWh9YeRfnKLUyr0jhUPpRLqV9CDgAeRPJWfzwxkQ7GM5B1om43g8cLsWp_J1VVNhiDY7IrpDvY07yK5V4yR8kw9AV6aiGiW7s2apbXq9adimzr4jHjUjvG_BrK4-f2u2fztKEQB2AvNcWNbx4VbXG0B45m8wDsuxziqBVUVfZIsKpGAzoWeC8o8mkDP2PSduHoAhDkMRZhccrCsmTExqhnNVOGh_JoAbcp8RBUy5N-OnRSUlCjcyLITnheJaI4JEg-YuzSYmuyiyD18FzFgBxR11uSMA7tg/3ft/m-AixNYxSyCjMsrFkM9-fA/h2/REtEQttHESW3YFUJT_z8dEOdO_mYadlqZXTMW_k3p28)**

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453197:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453197:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453197:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453197:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453197:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453197:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453198:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453199:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453200:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453201:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453202:6OJIAV2NU:m:1:3253819041:5E96D59964E8B21DE27C8B2F241BA179:r) **

body:
I have a hard time believing this
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36887401/309439684/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.1_TM_10H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJmZGVlOC02ZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hX5lu4b3tYyx_JbisuimbUgESxYSKRKeV3MzFj1lZoc=)

| | Derek, we’re exactly one month out from Election Day — we should be ramping up, getting excited, and operating on all cylinders.

**But instead, I’m hearing reports that Democrats are losing enthusiasm,_including right here in Virginia._**

In fact, _The Washington Post_ and _POLITICO_ are even reporting that Democrats’ lack of enthusiasm is jeopardizing our chance in this race!

Is this really true, Derek?

After we worked tirelessly to defeat Donald Trump last year, I would’ve expected that energy to carry over to our race — so I’m _**stunned**_ to learn that with just one month left, Democrats are checking out.

_**[We’ve got to turn this around as we head into the final stretch of this election, which is why I’m launching an immediate October kick-off goal of raising $250,000 by midnight tomorrow night. Can you help start us off strong by chipping in $30 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36887402/309439685/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.1_TM_10H&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJmZGVlOC02ZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hX5lu4b3tYyx_JbisuimbUgESxYSKRKeV3MzFj1lZoc=)**_ | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36887403/309439686/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.1_TM_10H&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJmZGVlOC02ZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hX5lu4b3tYyx_JbisuimbUgESxYSKRKeV3MzFj1lZoc=)**

clean_body: I have a hard time believing this | | | = | | Derek, we’re exactly one month out from Election Day — we should be ramping up, getting excited, and operating on all cylinders. But instead, I’m hearing reports that Democrats are losing enthusiasm,including right here in Virginia. In fact, The Washington Post and POLITICO are even reporting that Democrats’ lack of enthusiasm is jeopardizing our chance in this race! Is this really true, Derek? After we worked tirelessly to defeat Donald Trump last year, I would’ve expected that energy to carry over to our race — so I’m stunned to learn that with just one month left, Democrats are checking out. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Look, I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: the only way we’re going to be able to pull this off is if everybody steps up and pitches in wherever they can. So right now, I’m asking you to step up and make a contribution. Your donation will go directly toward funding our voter mobilization efforts — and right now, we can’t afford to pull any punches. = Thank you, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

That's what we've been hearing for MONTHS as the government shutdown our businesses, closed our schools, and shredded our Constitution.

**The Wuhan lab is behind COVID. Fauci is behind funding for the Wuhan lab. And there's no way this nightmare is going to end as long as Fauci is in a position of power.**

_That's why he's got to go._

Our RV was a big help getting us from town to town, but we were on the road for a while and it used a lot of gas...and thanks to Bidenflation, it was not cheap to fill that thing up!

**Can you chip in $3 to help us cover the cost of a gallon of gas and refill our gas fund before the end of the quarter?**

The momentum our campaign has right now is thanks to the support of so many people like you, and I am so thankful for everyone's support. Together, we can hold the line against the radical left and defend our freedom!

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

clean_body: | | Peter, We just wrapped up our Freedom Tour across the state and it was unbelievable! Thousands of people came out to show their support and I was so humbled by their words of encouragement. Our RV was a big help getting us from town to town, but we were on the road for a while and it used a lot of gas...and thanks to Bidenflation, it was not cheap to fill that thing up! Can you chip in $3 to help us cover the cost of a gallon of gas and refill our gas fund before the end of the quarter? The momentum our campaign has right now is thanks to the support of so many people like you, and I am so thankful for everyone's support. Together, we can hold the line against the radical left and defend our freedom! name: Senator Rob Ortt
subject: My column in today's New York Post
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Why can’t NY pols put public safety before political pandering?
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| Friend -
I wanted to make sure you saw my column in today's New York Post: [Why can't NY pols put public safety before political pandering? ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XjvrUz7CSOkvj1EQma07tR22LXi10UvGxSkjcrHvDOcqHLa3jdCnnChXE1w3XyGaF6fgawdXskbH_kPNivRmG9YKLklze4ClXOUWfxBhXsK3f2IBpycUftTxTBYlBs1ZalmUkgqpLzlSBEAN3bXu9Su3O0Lk6j8VI3YoLS6xnI-mCpJIGbjawB3Ak6icEEgIztu-qxvzvMa7QCotsUuZUO2kv_y7di3LKxgZ8YYTmoygQHJ5kkekjA==&c=4YLYN-C8Km8lbimQdQKVim8wQ07x5mEyM3pwRHbv3NWYU4M4Hcn4Fg==&ch=ka8pagNwldqn1ewzE3EKuwE_qLgsM-W9gRbfT5TxSFlyIiSLF0lDpg==) As our cities, state and nation experience one of the worst violent crimes spikes in years, New York's "progressive" politicians are focused more on appealing to their radical base than offering solutions to keep our communities safe. Please take a moment to read my column below.
---
| God bless,
---
|
---
| Rob Ortt Senate Republican Leader
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Why can't NY pols put public safety before political pandering?
Rob Ortt | October 1, 2021
---
| Public safety.
It's the one issue that should unite all elected officials regardless of political party -- especially as our cities, state and nation experience one of the worst violent crime spikes in decades. Yet these days, it seems like nearly every single New York Democrat (and the socialists who control the party) is more than ready, willing and able to ignore this terrifying issue and instead compete to see who is best at "progressive" pandering.
On Sept. 17, Gov. Kathy Hochul [signed into law the "Less Is More" bill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XjvrUz7CSOkvj1EQma07tR22LXi10UvGxSkjcrHvDOcqHLa3jdCnnChXE1w3XyGahWHUOfMFc3vvcActA40_HENOZoJDaey2dAUIhtkJJ5se26WYHSMDdvmjO_mS7DhiFLGgZwFeGyUzlOJstgQJseVoqPb-Oy6RpauWVpDFxdfpThpZekGc9M6wfoUajQ5K5LY_gt27EQdQ5B2uuJofsBaXuMDqzg76KzBFIgSDe4ba9BNfi7vjafoqlmH3lcyd&c=4YLYN-C8Km8lbimQdQKVim8wQ07x5mEyM3pwRHbv3NWYU4M4Hcn4Fg==&ch=ka8pagNwldqn1ewzE3EKuwE_qLgsM-W9gRbfT5TxSFlyIiSLF0lDpg==) -- the latest in a long line of pro-criminal, anti-victim, anti-law enforcement policies out of Albany under all-Democratic rule. As with so-called bail and discovery reforms rammed through earlier by Democrats, they disguise it by making it sound harmless, even good, to everyday, law-abiding New Yorkers.
The truth hidden behind the catchphrase couldn't be more different.
Already we're seeing all across the state the release of hundreds of dangerous individuals from behind bars under the "Less Is More" law. For those who have been paying attention, it's like deja vu all over again on the cashless-bail debacle from the past two years.
Democrats who supported the bill will boast that their latest get-out-of-jail-free card for criminals is only valid for "technical" or "minor" parole violations. What they are actually hiding from you is that many of the individuals being held on "technicalities" are truly violent recidivists. The reality is that their "Less Is More" law means fewer criminals behind bars and more victims as a result.

[Read the full piece online here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XjvrUz7CSOkvj1EQma07tR22LXi10UvGxSkjcrHvDOcqHLa3jdCnnChXE1w3XyGaF6fgawdXskbH_kPNivRmG9YKLklze4ClXOUWfxBhXsK3f2IBpycUftTxTBYlBs1ZalmUkgqpLzlSBEAN3bXu9Su3O0Lk6j8VI3YoLS6xnI-mCpJIGbjawB3Ak6icEEgIztu-qxvzvMa7QCotsUuZUO2kv_y7di3LKxgZ8YYTmoygQHJ5kkekjA==&c=4YLYN-C8Km8lbimQdQKVim8wQ07x5mEyM3pwRHbv3NWYU4M4Hcn4Fg==&ch=ka8pagNwldqn1ewzE3EKuwE_qLgsM-W9gRbfT5TxSFlyIiSLF0lDpg==)

Peter,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**

Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I've done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

| | Derek, Terry McAuliffe and I go back a long way and, let me tell you, you’re not going to find anyone who knows how to get more done for Virginia than him.

We don’t have to wonder what kind of governor Terry will be, we already know. He was a great governor for Virginia before, and he will be once again with your support.

_**[Will you join me in supporting Terry by rushing a donation to his campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36894452/309452352/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.2_JB_10R&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTc2MTBhOC04MDIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDFC3dtOx0vAojPdVNwvB5OuUJa2v_RlPI8wkJB-2Zc=)**_

Folks, the Virginia Governor’s race is a big deal not just for the Commonwealth but for our country.

Here’s why:

Terry is running against an acolyte of Donald Trump. And like Trump and so many in the Republican Party right now, Terry’s opponent is offering nothing but fear, lies and broken promises.

Folks, that’s not good enough, and it’s critical that we keep standing together to deliver that message.

Because you stood with me in 2020, I beat Donald Trump. Come November, we’ll beat Trump again, but only if you work just as hard for Terry as you did for me.

Virginia, in the battle for the soul of America, democracy prevailed. The Constitution held. We have to do it again and keep doing it.

Fifty years from now, our children and grandchildren will look back and know that it was at this moment America won the 21st century again.

And it starts now. Virginia, it starts with Terry. It starts with you, Derek.

_**[Please, will you contribute anything you can afford right now and help Terry McAuliffe win this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36894454/309452353/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.2_JB_10R&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTc2MTBhOC04MDIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDFC3dtOx0vAojPdVNwvB5OuUJa2v_RlPI8wkJB-2Zc=)**_

Thank you,

Joe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36894457/309452354/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.2_JB_10R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTc2MTBhOC04MDIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDFC3dtOx0vAojPdVNwvB5OuUJa2v_RlPI8wkJB-2Zc=)**

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu5ef4b86htvh2euuj20lf48jcj7pvc76vppb4do_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpbcs31cthm0opjeljb2pr0stgecpj2c2p68ptkecr64sr5cdh3at5h6jjm6sdgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imdj31cllmjjr4sb664ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cpi6ep73chhm49fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf713tu4t24vikat13cl3nea67t3a6u7d5jburbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chjm9or4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zovdet6p90ppsbk60v5mkhrd3kpm5909ghp5o590_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chjm9or4cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsbim7plkfad5tth3qoqkvof88679huj4359em3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chjm9or4cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. body:
| |
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/392b5e082bf2d6bf/5df25da39d774c7dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
|
---
# **Friend — Thanks for joining the team!**

---
Gary Black has delivered results for Georgia families, workers, and businesses in both the private sector and as Georgia’s Agriculture Commissioner. Now, he’s running for the U.S. Senate to help take America back. _**This election is too important for an experiment — trusted experience is the key!**_

We’re building a grassroots movement — Team ’22 — that’s like nothing Georgia’s ever seen, and we’re proud to have your support.

**Please save this email address and also follow Gary on[Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/392b5e082bf2d6bf/a8617468c948292fc3d6b838967d376c/37793), [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/392b5e082bf2d6bf/9d2b7c210adb6663c3d6b838967d376c/37793), and [Instagram](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/392b5e082bf2d6bf/bb899269230d34e9c3d6b838967d376c/37793).**

**[And if you’re able, we hope you’ll consider donating a few bucks to help fuel our campaign.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/392b5e082bf2d6bf/9e1092a52aeeca7dc3d6b838967d376c/37793) **This race will decide who controls the U.S. Senate next year, and it’s pivotal we have the resources it takes to win.
** **
Thank you again for signing up! We’re glad to have you onboard, and we’ll be in touch soon.
** **
Team Gary
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/392b5e082bf2d6bf/8d8dd34c6694c266c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
|
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_

I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.

With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/392b5e082bf2d6bf/d7f0187dfd0513e8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
|
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=392b5e082bf2d6bf&d=72005ebc555dcdf3c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=392b5e082bf2d6bf).
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:
Gary Black for Senate
P.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604

The Cook Political Report just INCREASED Marco Rubio's chances of losing in Florida – but Val Demings needs your immediate support. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFISWcFSo206Q4g_d1eays76-EgN5qsnqXTxp0Cj2cXrC7FqOG2tGNbQMD1-svhSyKo42W-Hz-WFlrRnXbsIGW5Rv1tj8THJEdp6hP8NFPCtgoSLGRQnZ2lQLrwCFcPTxPoe3N2B9iwU9T9veWJblPfpdFK78k_47Q3k6gjgAIRhoJvCtvUxESRKbMD68FWEoTCg6Hdvx4xxE9zfikA88yZTaMqRGgSkBK1RNxqGqTt1SO5WXui2USoYyvgirCBG_GUiarZlBdtJM6PCfPlYUk79c/3ft/zU9Uj-T_RaaWugmhkmB07Q/h0/dak0Edyhbkz0srRhl7hAHBVSrmbhhfIXc3_tlRItwOE)
**HUGE NEWS, Derek:

The Cook Political Report just _INCREASED_ Marco Rubio's chances of _losing_ in Florida – and Val Demings has never needed your immediate support more than this moment. ** **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFISWcFSo206Q4g_d1eays76_s58DrQUiEAbMqdWsN1tC0GNiSf1tgFyu2NVeJRTpkj7wmRJY4xZNgb4kPKclEKc8pyYLZyp8G4IcM1Yzdom7jif4QdIBn92SKtr0RsZxiICXi_QfrV5afHi8peDKjT7pLEnfIhuKF1vRloU6EiZXhH_lQ96_-I1zfrGOz-Oj1-qlB6yaS0Hi8n1D5egadTN2r9_F2C4gfpc3V_DaisvKpK5YtEa0wpL1EA82CH2xHygAXCEblBpax5gK9ljWNdpk/3ft/zU9Uj-T_RaaWugmhkmB07Q/h1/sQg6GU7RepjKB-tjrNMP928sK9Z8JCzQ_2xnbIwfV3k)** Rubio is hauling in MILLIONS to defeat Val Demings – and that's on top of the millions the Senate Republicans' campaign arm just raised to flip the Senate.

If we can't muster the grassroots resources to catch up, we won't be able to win in Florida. Marco Rubio and the GOP have a head start in statewide organization and mobilization – advantages that could decide this race and Senate control.

**That's why we NEED to raise $20,000 by midnight to build the resources it takes to protect this momentum. clean_body: The Cook Political Report just INCREASED Marco Rubio's chances of losing in Florida – but Val Demings needs your immediate support. | | | HUGE NEWS, Derek: The Cook Political Report just INCREASED Marco Rubio's chances of losing in Florida – and Val Demings has never needed your immediate support more than this moment. Rubio is hauling in MILLIONS to defeat Val Demings – and that's on top of the millions the Senate Republicans' campaign arm just raised to flip the Senate. If we can't muster the grassroots resources to catch up, we won't be able to win in Florida. Marco Rubio and the GOP have a head start in statewide organization and mobilization – advantages that could decide this race and Senate control. That's why we NEED to raise $20,000 by midnight to build the resources it takes to protect this momentum. Please, rush a split donation to support Common Good VA and Val Demings: Thanks for your support, Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . Hey friends,

I wanted to take the time out of my Saturday to personally thank you for all you have done for our campaign. Thanks to you and the rest of our grassroots team, I am pleased to say that we have reached our donation goal for September.

Our campaign wouldn’t be in such a good position if it weren’t for folks like you chipping in what they can -- folks giving just $5 or $20 when they can is how we’re going to win. We are proving that we have the resources to win this election and beat outside dark money groups and National Republicans.

I look forward to October, and I know that we can keep meeting our goals month after month with your continued support. I am excited to share more with you in the coming weeks.

Thank you for everything you have done,

Tom

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Keep Idaho IDAHO - Important Message from Ammon Bundy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter, _Thank you for signing up to receive email updates from my campaign for Governor of Idaho._ We will do our best to keep you informed but not inundate you with emails and information that may not be that important. I am going to get right to the point and not waste your time. At the end of this email _**I am going to ask you to _do your part to Keep Idaho IDAHO!_**_ I am going to ask you to [**_donate at least $20 a month to my campaign for the next 12 months_**](https://www.votebundy.com/donate/) **and** [_**complete each of the 20 Ways to Help Ammon Bundy**_](https://www.votebundy.com/support/20-ways-to-help-ammon/). Let me explain why it is so important that you help. I moved to Idaho in 2015, right before I was thrown into federal prison for two years, along with my father and brothers. _Idaho to me represented the best of what America was. Idaho was a conservative state with traditional family values, full of people with faith, who carried guns, loved the U.S. Constitution, helped each other and built businesses by the sweat of their own brow._ That's where I wanted to live and that's where I wanted to raise my family. I wanted to live in Idaho **because Idaho meant and represented all of those traditional conservative American values that you and I believe in.** Concerning our time in prison, despite having never even been convicted of a misdemeanor, we were prohibited from touching, or having any physical contact, with our wives or our little children - no, not even once in over 700 days. We also suffered for many, many months in solitary confinement. **My friends, it was terrible.** As you may know, the jury ultimately acquitted us, and when I left prison and came home to Idaho all I wanted was to be left alone and to take care of my little family. _I did not want anything to do with the government or anything even close to it. I even refused to register to vote._ I just wanted to be left alone. However, as time went on, I could see clearly that **those in power are never going to leave people alone _unless that power is further checked or limited._** Now, after living in Idaho for many years, I have seen untold corruption firsthand in our own state government, and then going through the so-called COVID crisis of last year, it became even more clear that Idaho was going down the wrong path, much like other states already have. _**Idaho is losing those elements that make us love this land so much.**_ **In short, Idaho is sliding down that path and ceasing to be the Idaho that we love. I don 't want that to happen.** _**I want Idaho to remain IDAHO.**_ Because we need to have at least ONE state in this country that is a shining example of safeguarding American principles and liberty - a light on a hill, if you will. We need Idaho to stay IDAHO! So, here I am today, running for Governor. But, more important than running for Governor, **[_I am presenting a plan to Keep Idaho IDAHO._](https://www.votebundy.com/about/keep-idaho-idaho-plan/)** _**What really matters is that we keep Idaho free and prosperous.**_ The Keep Idaho IDAHO Plan is simple and responsible. It frees the People of Idaho to more openly trade with each other without fear from improper use of government force. It protects police officers who follow their conscience. It empowers parents to fulfill their divine role and teachers to more fully help prepare children for a life of prosperity. This plan restores justice to a broken penal system, ends abortion and empowers communities to fight drug abuse in a practical way. _The Keep Idaho IDAHO Plan will open up entire new and prosperous industries in energy, healthcare and agriculture. This plan will solve Idaho 's affordable housing crisis while maintaining the rural culture that makes Idaho IDAHO._ Over all, **the** _**[**_Keep Idaho IDAHO Plan_**](https://www.votebundy.com/about/keep-idaho-idaho-plan/)**_ **will improve life, bring prosperity, empower and protect families and secure the opportunity for happiness to every person living within this beautiful state.** If other states see our example, they may also follow. The principles and ideas of this plan can be a blessing to people all over the country, maybe even the world. **_So, I am asking you to do your part to Keep Idaho IDAHO!_**_ _**I am asking you to[ _donate at least $20 a month to my campaign for the next 12 months_](https://www.votebundy.com/donate/) and [_complete all of the 20 Ways to Help Ammon Bundy_](https://www.votebundy.com/support/20-ways-to-help-ammon/).** As Governor, I will work vigorously to put the Keep Idaho IDAHO Plan in place and to insure that we do not lose our traditional American values that we love so much here in the great state of Idaho. May God bless the people of Idaho! May we live up to His blessings and keep Idaho a bastion of freedom and prosperity for years to come. **Together, let 's Keep Idaho IDAHO!**
Your Friend, Ammon Bundy

* * *

You received this email because your email address was submitted to us through [our website](https://www.votebundy.com). If you did not authorize use of this email address, or no longer wish to receive such messages, please simply [unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=#USERUUID#) to immediately have your address removed from our mailing list.

---
| [Home](https://www.votebundy.com) | [Keep Idaho IDAHO](https://www.votebundy.com/about/keep-idaho-idaho-plan/) | [Gear](https://gear.votebundy.com) | [Volunteer](https://www.votebundy.com/support/volunteer/) | [Donate!](https://www.votebundy.com/donate/) || [Unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=#USERUUID#)

Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www.votebundy.com)
Aaron Welling, Treasurer

(C) Copyright 2021 Ammon Bundy for Governor.
All rights reserved.

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Here’s how to vote by mail in PA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=100221&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=100221&amount=10]

Dear Friend,

We must defend our democracy from lawmakers who are desperate to undermine it. The best way to do that? By voting.

We'd like to help you get ready to cast your ballot on or before November 2, 2021.

If you plan to vote by mail, please remember that you’re expected to sign up to vote by mail each and every election. So even if you voted by mail last election, you have to fill out a form again to get your ballot.

The last day to register is October 18, 2021:

Apply to vote by mail: https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin

Vote in person: https://www.vote.pa.gov/Pages/default.aspx

Please support Keystone Progress in our efforts to Get Out The Vote and educate voters in areas of Pennsylvania that are often overlooked by progressive organizers by donating $10 today.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=100221&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=100121v&amount=10]

Thank you and see you at the polls!

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

body:
Because of supporters like you, we are on track to have the resources necessary to support a jam-packed slate of ballot measure campaigns heading into 2022. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36906374/309488011/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjllNDkxZS05MzIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlformwq1VKLVoOM9i9yGLv6qFwZb82oZmp_X_zFK4o=&emci=8c0e5f82-0a22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=f69e491e-9323-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=561582) | Friend, From all of us here at The Fairness Project, we wanted to say **thank you**. Because of supporters like you, we were able to exceed this quarter's $5,000 fundraising goal. We are on track to have the resources necessary to support a jam-packed slate of ballot measure campaigns heading into 2022. Since 2016, we’ve helped to change the lives of over 17 million Americans, and as we head into 2022 and the midterms, we’re ready to keep up our fight and change millions more. Supporters like you helped us to expand Medicaid and deliver health care for over 800,000 people across the country, put over $19 billion into the pockets of workers through raising the minimum wage, and so much more. So, friend, today we wanted to say thank you — for standing with us then and standing with us now as we fuel up for 2022 and our continued fight for economic fairness. Thank you for your continued support, — The Fairness Project

Because of supporters like you, we were able to exceed this quarter's $5,000 fundraising goal. We are on track to have the resources necessary to support a jam-packed slate of ballot measure campaigns heading into 2022. Since 2016, we’ve helped to change the lives of over 17 million Americans, and as we head into 2022 and the midterms, we’re ready to keep up our fight and change millions more. Supporters like you helped us to expand Medicaid and deliver health care for over 800,000 people across the country, put over $19 billion into the pockets of workers through raising the minimum wage, and so much more. So, friend, today we wanted to say thank you — for standing with us then and standing with us now as we fuel up for 2022 and our continued fight for economic fairness. Thank you for your continued support, — The Fairness Project = = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at The Fairness Project has won 20 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please click =#.** =# Contributions or gifts to The Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to The Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at The Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . Paid for by The Fairness Project The Fairness Project P.O. Box 21337 Washington, DC 20009 United States

We are officially ONE MONTH OUT from Election Day, so I wanted to send around a quick update on Early Voting and our campaign fundraising.

Peter,

I’ll keep this short because I’m sure you’re taking a break from opening emails after the end-of-quarter finish that many campaigns just had.

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for everything you’ve done for our campaign in the last three months. Without you, we wouldn’t be able to be building a grassroots campaign that can and will defeat Ron Johnson next year.

Our team is putting in the work to prepare for one of the most consequential U.S. Senate elections in Wisconsin’s history. This is how we beat Ron Johnson, keep our majority in the U.S. Senate, and continue to work for the people of Wisconsin.

I'm so proud of this team, and I can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve shown my campaign.

Thank you again,

Alex
---

name: Donna Imam
subject: Thank you.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36908082/309493723/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU1YzI2NS05ODIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmK94nHX_I-eGYOd12g3eUt9wCt0rHhr9loCTOZw9mo=)
Team,

I know my team and I were in touch a lot ahead of our very first FEC fundraising deadline on Thursday. **I'm pleased to let you know that because of supporters like you -- we met the mark.**_Thank you so much!_

I'm confident we can win this race, but it's going to take a ton of people chipping in small amounts AND volunteering for our ambitious field program.

**The first major test of our campaign's strength at the ballot box hits March 1st of 2022, meaning we're officially five months away from the primary election.** We need to be ready to go at a moment's notice, as soon as the district is finalized. And more importantly, we need to keep advancing our strong economic message for working families if we're going to lay the groundwork to win this seat and turn the rest of Texas blue.

Last year, we knocked over 50,000 doors in TX-31 and ran turnout up so high that we broke records, not just here locally but across the state of Texas. We'll have to do it again this year, and we have to start now.

[**Will you sign up as a volunteer for our campaign? It's going to take an army of volunteers knocking doors, making calls, and sending texts to break the GOP's stranglehold on the rest of Texas.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36908083/309493724/1452546941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU1YzI2NS05ODIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmK94nHX_I-eGYOd12g3eUt9wCt0rHhr9loCTOZw9mo=&emci=8ee5c265-9823-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=8fe5c265-9823-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=7168977)
| **[Volunteer →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36908084/309493725/1452546941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU1YzI2NS05ODIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmK94nHX_I-eGYOd12g3eUt9wCt0rHhr9loCTOZw9mo=&emci=8ee5c265-9823-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=8fe5c265-9823-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=7168977)**
---

Thank you again for all you've done to support this campaign, whether it's chipping in a few bucks here and there, or offering to volunteer on our team, it all makes a difference.

It's been hard cutting through the noise in Washington, but this is our chance to send a real champion for working people to Congress -- and I believe that we can only do that together.

Thank you.

_\- Donna_

clean_body: | = Team, I know my team and I were in touch a lot ahead of our very first FEC fundraising deadline on Thursday. I'm pleased to let you know that because of supporters like you -- we met the mark.Thank you so much! I'm confident we can win this race, but it's going to take a ton of people chipping in small amounts AND volunteering for our ambitious field program. The first major test of our campaign's strength at the ballot box hits March 1st of 2022, meaning we're officially five months away from the primary election. We need to be ready to go at a moment's notice, as soon as the district is finalized. And more importantly, we need to keep advancing our strong economic message for working families if we're going to lay the groundwork to win this seat and turn the rest of Texas blue. Last year, we knocked over 50,000 doors in TX-31 and ran turnout up so high that we broke records, not just here locally but across the state of Texas. We'll have to do it again this year, and we have to start now. | Thank you again for all you've done to support this campaign, whether it's chipping in a few bucks here and there, or offering to volunteer on our team, it all makes a difference. It's been hard cutting through the noise in Washington, but this is our chance to send a real champion for working people to Congress -- and I believe that we can only do that together. Thank you. \- Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. body:
Today, people are coming together in all 50 states at more than 540 marches to raise our voices and make clear that the majority of Americans overwhelmingly support Roe v. Wade.
#
Peter,
Today, people are coming together in all 50 states at more than 540 marches to raise our voices and make clear that the majority of Americans overwhelmingly support Roe v. Wade and will fight to protect reproductive rights.
As state lawmakers and the Supreme Court continue to jeopardize the constitutional right to abortion, we must fight back -- and we won’t stop fighting until abortion is more than just legally protected, but truly available for everyone who needs one. Abortion is health care: it should be a right, not a privilege.
**Peter, we absolutely can’t let extreme Republicans roll back the right to abortion in this country. And today, in person and virtually, we are rallying together and supporting reproductive health care.**
**[Whether you’re attending a rally today or not, you can add your voice to the fight, too. Will you sign your name to Patty Murray’s petition if you support the constitutional right to abortion?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36908306/309494994/2106139006?ms=pm_em_211002_1&refcode=pm_em_211002_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjQzZWE5Mi05OTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T5vueStk3QuzKH_4o1UHAytNrJCZLgmcFUqdwDXe-wQ=&emci=b32e5a5b-ef22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=6243ea92-9923-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13116610)**

Moments like these help me keep going when things get tough. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36908484/309496625/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzBlOWVkMi05OTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9kGxtsGnvRRfCtleMOv75LJY5yejk1BkY3eRe1XYvM=)
I know my team and I were in touch a lot over the past week. We had an important deadline that hit Thursday -- I'm thrilled to let you know we exceeded the mark thanks to supporters like you friend.

_I'm thrilled._ So thrilled I'm literally jumping for joy:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36908486/309496633/-73891749?refcode=em-10221-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzBlOWVkMi05OTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9kGxtsGnvRRfCtleMOv75LJY5yejk1BkY3eRe1XYvM=)
_Moments like these help me keep going when things get tough._
Joke aside, _fundraising is only one part of this campaign._ I'm traveling the state to meet with Iowans to talk (and listen!) about issues that matter to them.

The video is from a stop we made in Clinton, where I toured the Gateway Area Community Center. I learned about how their boxing club engages young people to invest in their future. Not much different from what we're doing with this campaign, by the way.

**We're building a movement for all Iowans to feel welcome in this campaign, with the shared goal of defeating Kim Reynolds and moving Iowa forward.** Fundraising helps provide the fuel, but it's only part of the bigger picture.

I appreciate everything you've done to help me meet my goal this month, and I'm excited for the month ahead. We'll have some exciting updates for you soon, stay tuned.

_\- Ras_

| INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C7DhLECfZkvsXYt4fVyEN7PIT-5IVcySdW_0_AjPoV2fpkQyJz9dszZkkpH9fh6aP_Q-dQV0-X4knuYuSbq2FhsH7tG9jq4r_JVdDodk9j9HjBOnTtb-w88wxfh4XFCt78E-6nZZ89XM9Knf9PqRCJKZOrT0grXYDBcBUILmg3s=&c=tO50InCVVn_95pRDHpXWUbn76a5khwOoSbXjCyNwIucGG3PBkixdcw==&ch=FbzbPxv4Ya8on4Y5Rl1VfRwH0Cerp2CiY53u_1piagQgk5jd1CAKBA==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C7DhLECfZkvsXYt4fVyEN7PIT-5IVcySdW_0_AjPoV2fpkQyJz9dszZkkpH9fh6a-dOZTz7NCPEkNiC9G2ADOuUNOeFCCTSxNPuy4Qms2NqSs_z6_OgmEn9cC_crjjcP-DMOijwll_qgEnlNwq9JqByYLpo7k--3TuhnCAd5dR6o5Xt6uInY_NzbsNJ3nGLpWihGEsTgiu3MDKwMilBEOlRMxBM6JwA5WyQWf3PtSjI=&c=tO50InCVVn_95pRDHpXWUbn76a5khwOoSbXjCyNwIucGG3PBkixdcw==&ch=FbzbPxv4Ya8on4Y5Rl1VfRwH0Cerp2CiY53u_1piagQgk5jd1CAKBA==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | Tuesday was National Voter Registration Day! Greater Georgia has been == statewide to ensure more people are registered and engaged in our political process and that they know their voices matter. Our field team stopped by Truett McConnell University in Cleveland to register voters and to knock doors in the area. | == | == | == | Meanwhile, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler was in Savannah and also sent out a message encouraging Georgians to register to vote. In case you missed it, catch the video below: | == | Finally, local elections are coming up this November. The deadline to register to vote in these elections is this Monday, October 4. If you are not already registered, click the link below to do so. If you are registered, please reach out to five friends who are not and encourage them to register today! Click == to register to vote. Click == to check your voter status and information. Click == or the photo below to listen to the full interview: | == | This work is vital to defending conservative values, and it will only be possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click == or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | | == | | | | UPDATES: | LUNCH WITH THE WALTON COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE Kelly took lunch over to the Walton County Sheriff's Office to thank these heroes for all the hard work they do to keep us safe. Sept. 30, 2021 | == | == | == | == | | | | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM Greater Georgia has officially launched an ==! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress. If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application. The full internship application can be found ==. | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Kelly Loeffler Joins Bill Edwards' WTKS Savannah Radio Show Sept. 28, 2021 | == | "We know that elections have consequences. Everything's at stake, and we have to make sure that we're engaged, that folks are getting out to register. "Please get out and register. If you've moved or changed your address, please check on the == to make sure that you're registered in the right area, that your address and your precinct are up to date ... these types of things can really save our country..." name: info@karenbass.com
subject: Sarah, Alexander, and Yui
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022
body:
Team --

It's only been a couple of days since Karen launched her campaign for mayor, and in that short time, we've seen a groundswell of support from people all across the city. There's Sarah from Silver Lake, who chipped in $3. Alexander from Boyle Heights, who donated $10. And Yui from Venice, who chipped in $5, then $25 more after that!

This is a people-powered movement for every Angeleno, and Karen is determined to build a campaign with donations from every single zip code. It doesn't matter where you live, team. You deserve a mayor who will show up and work for you. Karen is ready to roll up her sleeves and get to work as LA's next mayor, but she needs grassroots support to make it happen.

**[Our team set a goal of raising $50,000 before Sunday at midnight so we can prove the strength of this campaign right off the bat. We know this is an ambitious goal, but we can reach it with your support. Will you chip in before Sunday's deadline to help launch this campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eAAfx86Z5g_qx5sDVAbleNLLlgjHCx5GzdtWFQV9Tm8=/J2-IZOqqSuSIl_XONfTXSElFNvvTlLo59i5De-cd-aI=?ms=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

The reason our campaign is unconventional is that Karen is an unconventional candidate. Karen's been a nurse and Physician Assistant, a community organizer, and a member of Congress. Now, Karen's running to represent the same exact neighborhoods she grew up in.

All eyes will be on Los Angeles to see how our city rebuilds and recovers in the face of COVID-19. And Karen is ready to build a city that includes everyone -- not just the wealthy and the well-known -- but the people who have kept the lights on even in the darkest of times.

**[To win this race, we have to help Karen build a winning campaign. Sunday's deadline is our first challenge. Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can now to help Karen reach our $50,000 goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eAAfx86Z5g_qx5sDVAbleNLLlgjHCx5GzdtWFQV9Tm8=/J2-IZOqqSuSIl_XONfTXSElFNvvTlLo59i5De-cd-aI=?ms=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

Let's go,

Karen Bass Finance Team

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of LA. Thanks to LA's matching funds program, donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/eAAfx86Z5g_qx5sDVAbleNLLlgjHCx5GzdtWFQV9Tm8=/J2-IZOqqSuSIl_XONfTXSElFNvvTlLo59i5De-cd-aI=?ms=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alftr&source=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alftr&utm_campaign=em21_211002_fr1_fndd_gq_act___ikb_ettx_alftr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

name: Chief James Craig Team
subject: what will stop Gretchen Whitmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) Peter, **It 's official: Gretchen Whitmer has a challenger for Michigan Governor that has the Democrats shaking in their boots.** Someone who is not a politician. Someone who has a record of serving the people of Michigan and getting real results. Someone even the Detroit News is talking about as a challenger that will leave the Democrats flat-footed. So who is this candidate? **It 's Chief James Craig, the former Detroit police chief and Michigan's next governor...** How do we know they're scared?****_They sent a group of thugs to rush the stage and try to disrupt our announcement event in Detroit. _ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) **That 's right, on national television they tried to take over our event and tried to shout the chief down.** _Believe me, as Chief of Police in Detroit, Chief Craig has taken on much tougher groups than this._ There is no way they're going to deter him from taking on Gretchen Whtimer, and there is NO WAY THEY ARE GOING TO STOP US FROM MAKING REAL CHANGES to the way things are run.
This chief is going to stand up. **[Will you make a donation right now and stand up with him?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r)**
Let us tell you a little bit about why his entry into the race this month is turning heads across Michigan... and across the country.
Before he had even declared that he was running, Tucker Carlson invited Chief Craig on his show. They talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and you should see what Tucker had to say about his time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020: _" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters."_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) His 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order. See, the Chief grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, seeing tanks rolling down the streets and snipers on the roofs. He was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. He saw that happen. **Since he 's been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated.**
When he came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. The Chief started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. He made it an example. The police mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, they cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) Then, the Chief went into the city and met with every group he could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, **_Detroit did not burn_**.
Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?
Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.
You don't see much of that out there. **That 's why he crisscrossed the state this month announcing his candidacy for Governor of Michigan. ** The Chief believes in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why we're inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r)** [**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) Sometimes people are surprised to hear that the Chief is a Republican. He grew up a Democrat. But then he watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. He watched as they pushed handouts that increased dependency on the government for political gain. **And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT his values. He voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.** _**And we 're pretty sure you can guess HIS position on "Defund the Police!"**_ Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front. **Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join us in supporting Chief James Craig for Governor?** _**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**_ [**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453943:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) [**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453944:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) [**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453945:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) [**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453946:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) [**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453947:JFChEV2WN:m:1:3253819041:88A2FA9629C21110A9CFB7243BEE9601:r) __**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**__ | |
---
- Chief James Craig Team

name: marcolopez.com
subject: did you see our last email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
Hi, friend, we needed to make sure you saw Marco's email from yesterday. We're so close to making up our budget shortfall – but we just checked the numbers, and **if grassroots supporters like you don't rush your immediate support, we're on track to _fall short again._**
Moments like this are make-or-break for our progressive movement, and with our Trump-backed opponent surging in the polls, we can't afford to miss this goal, fall behind and cede control of our state to these extremists.
**So please, friend, time is running out and Marco is counting on you:[Will you rush $5 or more right now – as much as you can spare before midnight tonight – so we can close our budget gap, defeat GOP extremists and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36909236/309499501/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk245-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2VhNTk4NC05YTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zq14TGjBL9A3w79CU1PyRcS-6U8Co_0ZvVBt6rYxjBQ=)**
Thank you for always coming through, friend. Marco will be proud.

– Team Lopez
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Marco Lopez**
Date: Fri, Oct 1, 2021
Subject: we fell short
|
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36909237/309499514/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk245-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2VhNTk4NC05YTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zq14TGjBL9A3w79CU1PyRcS-6U8Co_0ZvVBt6rYxjBQ=)

Hey, friend – we're in a critical situation and don't have a lot of time to fix it, so I'll cut to the chase: **We fell short of our end-of-quarter goal, and now we're behind in the battleground race that will determine the course of Arizona's future.**
We never want to fall behind like this, but it really couldn't have happened at a worse time. Experts have been calling our race a toss-up, meaning any news has the potential to make or break our chances – and the far-right extremists just got a serious boost when Trump endorsed my Republican opponent.

Now, Trump and his shady megadonors will be spending MILLIONS to prop up their extremist pick, so we need to redouble our efforts to fight back and build a state that works for all our people. That's why I'm reaching out today.
**I know we can still win this. I know we can come back from this deficit, close the gap and show who we really are. That's why my team agreed to extend our deadline _one more day –_ just 24 hours – and I'm really counting on your help to close this budget gap as soon as we possibly can.

[With Arizona's future on the line and experts saying we can finally flip our state blue, please: Will you rush a donation right now, before our extended deadline expires in 24 hours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36909238/309499522/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk245-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2VhNTk4NC05YTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zq14TGjBL9A3w79CU1PyRcS-6U8Co_0ZvVBt6rYxjBQ=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36909239/309499529/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk245-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2VhNTk4NC05YTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zq14TGjBL9A3w79CU1PyRcS-6U8Co_0ZvVBt6rYxjBQ=)

name: Team Beshear
subject: Did you hear the news, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy Beshear is officially running for re-election! Did you hear the news, Peter?

Andy Beshear is officially running for re-election!

The last eighteen months have been really challenging. And they could have been even more challenging -- without the steady, responsible leadership of Andy Beshear.

When the pandemic hit, Andy led a comprehensive response to COVID-19 to protect Kentuckians, essential workers, and small businesses. He followed an ambitious agenda and made progress to help rebuild the economy for all Kentuckians. Now, as we navigate the rise in the Delta variant, Andy is staying laser-focused on keeping communities safe.

There aren't enough people in politics who are willing to do the right thing, even when it's tough or the critics are especially loud. Kentucky has been fortunate to have Andy’s steadfast leadership at the helm.

Andy was born in Kentucky, educated here in our amazing public schools, and chose to raise his family here. Fighting for our Commonwealth is personal to him. Public service has been the cornerstone of his life, but the road to re-election is going to be tough. He won in 2019 by one of the smallest margins in the country, so it will take all of us coming together to keep decency in the governor's office. We're counting on this team to have his back every step of the way.

We'll have important updates in the weeks and months ahead, and it's crucial that you don't miss a beat. Make sure you stay up to date on our campaign by following us on social media! clean_body: There is a lot to be worried about right now | Peter — Thank you!! I'll be honest, we came up a little short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. But even though we missed our goal, I’m still so grateful for all your support -- whether you donated, signed petitions, read my emails or have supported me in any other way -- I truly appreciate it. Although there is a lot to be worried about right now -- MAGA challengers, losing our House majority, the future of Roe v. Wade, raging wildfires, and more -- I am optimistic that with you on my side, we will persevere and continue to build a stronger, more equitable California and nation. But Peter, we have a lot of work to do and October will be a very busy month. If we want to take on Trump and the rest of the MAGA party, we need to hit our fundraising goals. And because we missed last quarter’s goal, we have our work cut out for us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Again, thank you so much for everything you do. Mark Takano Congressman, CA-41 | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Critical Race Theory - Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/criticalracetheoryupdatefrommcpp?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=38fbaca047&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=45bbed4f54&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4471738a52&e=5703353baa)
---
| Friend,

Critical race theory is one of the biggest challenges that America faces today.

**This radical Marxist ideology has spread out from college campuses into the workplace, government and even the military.**

Critical race theorists argue that America was founded on racial supremacy and oppression. Like conventional Marxism, this ideology divides society between the oppressors and the oppressed. But unlike old school Marxism, with its categorization by class, critical race theory categorizes Americans by race.

This is deeply divisive and dangerous. **So why on earth are we using public money to promote this agenda?**

Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy we believe it is time to confront this divisive agenda – which is why **this coming week we will be publishing a report on _Combating Critical Race Theory in Mississippi._**
---
|
---
| Our report looks at how prevalent Critical Race Theory actually is in our state. We then set out a series of practical steps we believe our leaders need to take to ensure that this extremist agenda is not promoted using public money.

The United States was founded on the ideal that everyone possesses their own ‘inalienable rights.’ That principle, however imperfectly applied, helped to define the United States as a country that respected people as individuals.

Critical race theory stands that ideal on its head, insisting instead that we define ourselves according to immutable characteristics. **This ideology is profoundly un-American and anti-American.**

Critical race theory can be defeated – but we need to first understand the extent to which it is actually being taught and appreciate precisely what it is. Our report is the first step towards accomplishing this in our state.

Please look out for my email - I will be sending you a link to download your personal copy in a few days.

Have a great weekend!
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b1962cb039&e=5703353baa)
---
Many on the Left claim to be supporters and advocates of blue-collar working families, such as farmers and ranchers. “Tax the Rich” they say. But an example of how untrue these claims are can be found in a proposed change to the capital gains tax that would hurt many family farms.
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=04548bffbe&e=5703353baa)
---
It can be easy to think about terms like “inflation” as theoretical ideas and not connect how much macroeconomics affects the lives of average Americans. But a recent development is an unfortunate example of just how much inflation actually affects average Americans. Retail chain “Dollar Tree” has recently announced it is raising prices above 1 dollar.

|
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=aea455e437&e=5703353baa)
---
[https://mspolicy.org/mississippi-should-expand-telemedicine-access/](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0ce0efebec&e=5703353baa)It can be easy to think about terms like “inflation” as theoretical ideas and not connect how much macroeconomics affects the lives of average Americans. But a recent development is an unfortunate example of just how much inflation actually affects average Americans. Retail chain “Dollar Tree” has recently announced it is raising prices above 1 dollar.
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f86d44ce68&e=5703353baa)
---
Douglas Carswell stopped by the SuperTalk studio to break down the failures of the Charter School advisory board to approve any new charter schools in the Magnolia State this year and to explain how he thinks we should move forward in cutting income tax.
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a5f6e9ac6d&e=5703353baa)
---
In the name of combating misinformation, the Mississippi State Board of Medical Licensure recently issued a new policy that vaguely prohibits medical misinformation from being spread by doctors, particularly on social media.
