name: Susie Lee
subject: This is thanks to you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
You’ve done it again

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36910852/309506147/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211002_FR_EOQTY_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI0NmIzNC1hMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEpakRbRbkDL-bjD3IqEu-TvcsaGPDUv0SSs8TFhoLM=) Folks — **Thanks to you, I’m excited to announce that my campaign has officially reached its end-of-quarter goal!** Hitting this goal was a landmark for our grassroots organization and the impact that it has goes even beyond our campaign. Because of you, _we showed the Republican Party that our team of supporters is energized and ready to fight to keep this district blue._ **Let’s celebrate today and acknowledge that our work here isn’t done until we win in 2022.[_Will you chip in to my campaign and help build on the momentum we need to keep this seat bright blue in 2022?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36910854/309506150/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211002_FR_EOQTY_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI0NmIzNC1hMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEpakRbRbkDL-bjD3IqEu-TvcsaGPDUv0SSs8TFhoLM=)** | | | [Chip in: Keep NV-03 Blue >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36910856/309506152/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211002_FR_EOQTY_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI0NmIzNC1hMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEpakRbRbkDL-bjD3IqEu-TvcsaGPDUv0SSs8TFhoLM=)
---
With more than **$1 million now being spent against me** by Republican dark money and corporate interests, we’re up against a pretty strong machine. On top of that, **the number of Republicans lined up against me to run is only growing** — _we’re now up to five!_
And team, if I’m being honest, _both of those figures are going to get much larger from now through 2022._
It goes without saying that we have a pretty big race on our hands. Now that we’ve hit our goal, I’m confident that we have the GOP bosses shaking in their shoes. So, let’s make sure we use that as an opportunity to make our message even clearer: **we’re fighting hard to keep NV-03 blue.**

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Couldn't have done it without you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Earlier this week, we faced one of our biggest deadlines of the year -- our FEC end-of-quarter deadline. I just spoke with my team and they let me know that we hit our ambitious fundraising goal! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36910909/309506237/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI0NmIzNC1hMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yy91JyjxiNcONYyhg6aJMsEPl3HjLdVmuwOsPc_fK-I=&emci=2993d60c-dc22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=da246b34-a223-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Earlier this week, we faced one of our biggest deadlines of the year -- our FEC end-of-quarter deadline. **I just spoke with my team and they let me know that we hit our ambitious fundraising goal!**

We couldn't have gotten there without your support, Peter. Since I've never accepted a dime of corporate PAC money, we hit this goal because of grassroots supporters like you who chipped in a few dollars at a time.

Hitting this goal was a huge accomplishment. When our fundraising numbers are made public in a few days, national Republicans, our opponents, and their allies will see that this grassroots team has what it takes to defend this seat and our Democratic House majority.

I'm incredibly grateful for your continued support. You're the reason we were able to flip Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018 and kept it blue in 2020. I know that if we continue to work together, we can protect this seat in the midterms and keep me working in Congress for you.

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36910910/309506249/474719155?refcode=em21_211002_eoqty_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211002_eoqty_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI0NmIzNC1hMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yy91JyjxiNcONYyhg6aJMsEPl3HjLdVmuwOsPc_fK-I=)

name: Team JB
subject: Welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor
body:
Welcome, friend!

We're so thankful that you joined our campaign. There will be plenty of things you can do to help JB and Juliana in the weeks and months ahead, but here are three actions you can take right now:

1. So much of the story of this campaign will take place in your newsfeeds. So make sure you're following along on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram.
Facebook
[https://www.facebook.com/jbpritzker]

Twitter
[https://twitter.com/JBPritzker]

Instagram
[https://www.instagram.com/jbpritzker/]

Folks, we’re on the frontlines of the fight to keep the House blue in 2022 -- and things aren’t looking good.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36911597/309508731/1883602356?refcode=EM_BS_HTH_2106_FR_Onboard1_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDExMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmUyMThlZS1hMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPzRW9pjOtfl2EF7bfiXLIaEj3ME_64Hlu8ypa3hRmM=) Folks, We’re on the frontlines of the fight to keep the House blue in 2022 -- and things aren’t looking good. And this year, GOP lawmakers have passed 389 voter suppression bills in 48 states -- we need to fight that much harder for every single vote. Our Democratic House Majority is razor-thin -- Republicans only need to flip 5 seats to flip the House red. _There’s no room for error._ **But here’s the good news: we know how to win.** Thanks to over 8,000 grassroots donors like you, we sent nearly $400,000 _directly_ to the most vulnerable House Democrats in the country ahead of the 2020 election. Friend, from the bottom of my heart: thank you.
When I first made the decision to run for Congress, I knew I wanted to run a campaign based on grassroots efforts and I am proud to say that thanks to your support that wish has been fulfilled. **Thanks to your continued commitment to this campaign, I'm proud to report that we surpassed our ambitious fundraising goal for the quarter.**
I am continually blown away by your support -- from contributions, to actions, to kind words. I couldn’t be prouder to have you by my side.
**I know that with you on my team, anything is possible.**
Thank you again,
Kirsten

subject: I’m running for the United States Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=17c4676943eb4a8a8245079f3ee2c70b&_e=W2upgGSYX9YTVpAmRPoHBePu2voofC8Sg-uqT4CmFTsn0IAUZKtYR0yad2lppgmQRQO3eh5eoh7zRuIDbJ2Gy4IpfCi3V7By3j93Ypkz2rAx-mhUM-trv_11XLFBiZxhoI_jpirqgRslz_5y5UrRQQ0xLF56RquyldcDnlXmzubRB-1OYlTp2W-By-KNC2_cE7SaYMkInsUzYLUvvv3mvUD_UwLwerhPyfT0Nq9al_3o7difsd9KqtIFcDqYQv7lBOsq7xrAyYI9txbMO-_X3yALiStLL35qFMH-Zt2pUnfzA7imnZv-Jr8QoopdFTvAiU0IaFlIBmoE6-V8M6jHvVrF2UzwYfHwpkol1gB6ftHqatO3vfn-obnJfPAQta3bSy5msyeGRMYrapocRvsN683WoQoap-WZgCS_MwnZoPLQ62FV9bRoHJFp9NCaB6g8VwmTDMD1tl2MqrFNzeSDqlbzSqQUSx811K8srTY2KCM%3D)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=17c4676943eb4a8a8245079f3ee2c70b&_e=W2upgGSYX9YTVpAmRPoHBePu2voofC8Sg-uqT4CmFTsn0IAUZKtYR0yad2lppgmQRQO3eh5eoh7zRuIDbJ2Gy4IpfCi3V7By3j93Ypkz2rAx-mhUM-trv_11XLFBiZxhoI_jpirqgRslz_5y5UrRQQ0xLF56RquyldcDnlXmzubRB-1OYlTp2W-By-KNC2_cE7SaYMkInsUzYLUvvv3mvUD_UwLwerhPyfT0Nq9al_3o7difsd9KqtIFcDqYQv7lBOsq7xrAyYI9txbMO-_X36ScxW0EXyLhniHNSx8KOVoKkVq-eUJjuXJEKkeCRsrwlD3j7diZejsA0yGkruZkpoTqFZeWeQXMr75Gp4_RsuCsZZugwVLi_x5pdM9XALm_rKG4CWh5FDs4EQ3X8XQsSg7OkNntjOtUZKxlIQQevUYFF6nqJtrz8fy6qr0Oq6cwTzlinfavBsM7BEj3lgQv7M8LcLwCeLso3S_LxO3-v8Y%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=17c4676943eb4a8a8245079f3ee2c70b&_e=W2upgGSYX9YTVpAmRPoHBePu2voofC8Sg-uqT4CmFTsn0IAUZKtYR0yad2lppgmQRQO3eh5eoh7zRuIDbJ2Gy4IpfCi3V7By3j93Ypkz2rAx-mhUM-trv_11XLFBiZxhoI_jpirqgRslz_5y5UrRQQ0xLF56RquyldcDnlXmzubRB-1OYlTp2W-By-KNC2_cE7SaYMkInsUzYLUvvv3mvUD_UwLwerhPyfT0Nq9al_3o7difsd9KqtIFcDqYQv7lBOsq7xrAyYI9txbMO-_X31qOZIfBIvGl2iEKEt_HL6_uY1ELnFb4r-Hplyu2jqHiBmcoNdLPx8--8yGpiE65KfU7Jb7pAqwT-uNNJQfOYHVmuvY9llVAMqdo0hhsNnbIMG8kXbUmHXNQoEIjyZh6ceJOaXL6uaaP15MLuhQLDtbqvuqRjswUi0uVhXp80CNBEPQxwhguOK8xTHSIHG-3ItJvlVWE9CmkK3XnmJTRBTo%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=17c4676943eb4a8a8245079f3ee2c70b&_e=W2upgGSYX9YTVpAmRPoHBePu2voofC8Sg-uqT4CmFTsn0IAUZKtYR0yad2lppgmQRQO3eh5eoh7zRuIDbJ2Gy4IpfCi3V7By3j93Ypkz2rAx-mhUM-trv_11XLFBiZxhoI_jpirqgRslz_5y5UrRQQ0xLF56RquyldcDnlXmzubRB-1OYlTp2W-By-KNC2_cE7SaYMkInsUzYLUvvv3mvUD_UwLwerhPyfT0Nq9al_3o7difsd9KqtIFcDqYQv7lBOsq7xrAyYI9txbMO-_X372eunDEyVR7dN4yT8i7ZK7ela0Pze_SH7d9mNMtR9IT0aalrmJBQgKYG_PdoeAC8TPK1n5nlgRU25oHFHDt4M7npeyjfrfzBWeBsrxGb3iWxfGldVTvoG6gHAtySjZaSSCJmlK-OmgNArDpZZiw2_o-K3VXLm600p8-qEkCXh7DX6sPax_TLPrDOWRph4y9D2Zr4U_pUbvjgTLo9HC8k6Q%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Peter, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| Friend,

I know you receive an overwhelming amount of emails and messages from my campaign, and I appreciate you being on Team Ramirez as we work tirelessly to win Virginia’s 7th district.

I wanted to take a moment and explain why we are doing what we do online. Right now Abigail Spanberger is raising money and advertising non-stop because she knows we are neck and neck with her campaign. We are wholeheartedly determined to get her out of office and undo the damage she has done and will continue to do to our country. It’s thanks to supporters like you, Friend, that we can continue to fight so hard.

Thanks to you, we have raised well over $300,000 in the first quarter since the launch of our campaign. We are now one step closer to taking back the House in 2022, one step closer to taking back Virginia, and one step closer to taking back our Country.

I cannot thank you enough for your support.

Thank you again,

Tina Ramirez

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get vaccinated or starve"
body:
Peter, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**" Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve. "** _ **_I 'll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order?** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453986:JpVbIV2Nl:m:1:3253819041:378B3C0270F969FE29946A9344AB3CA1:r) This isn't an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don 't get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don't care about your right to religious freedom... They don't care about your right to medical privacy... They don't care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453986:JpVbIV2Nl:m:1:3253819041:378B3C0270F969FE29946A9344AB3CA1:r) If we don't stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can't do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden's UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they've shouted, "my body, my choice." But it's clear that they only care about "your body" and "your choice" when it fits their political narrative. And if we don't take immediate action against the Biden Administration's new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453986:JpVbIV2Nl:m:1:3253819041:378B3C0270F969FE29946A9344AB3CA1:r) If we don't fight to keep our freedoms today, they'll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453986:JpVbIV2Nl:m:1:3253819041:378B3C0270F969FE29946A9344AB3CA1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453986:JpVbIV2Nl:m:1:3253819041:378B3C0270F969FE29946A9344AB3CA1:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58453986:JpVbIV2Nl:m:1:3253819041:378B3C0270F969FE29946A9344AB3CA1:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

body:
CNN has named me one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGpvexS7o2NqearD_Ha6CpVV9800mqvK36eulPcW5oXNk_Q_kW3RqP2vi85MFwrTddECghu76r0514EiZqSxX8ogtxBBs3vCA8ggGNo7L9K7hAue-78X2nzfUHvGuOGcNQpzSyTolTFeTwkW7HBQ8WQGAdp1Mv_4efRCArMyI4K1DLIt12FI11ndAd43_vQ6CWuPK2LtTQB1jr7AKRCTT5NtLcNTPZCXsKFa8dfqjRcBhe4hCdalUE02rVp4C11XNbhPS0qvg921JuzOZ867e4lzb2x9SvbLZTgJoAOWtRq10/3ft/F7-5_BYyR8O_ZA0Tjq4dRg/h0/V61-3o-nA7CW_MRzmuF-8Fv9u1P7fcyOGtpZYAYSmHo) Derek, I wish I was reaching out with good news, but CNN has named me one of the **most vulnerable senators in the nation.**

GOP outside groups have _already_ spent over $1 million to flip this seat – and _The Cook Political Report_ just _downgraded_ my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race.

Let me be very clear: Senate control hinges on what happens in Nevada – and I'm about to fall short of my urgent rapid-response goal.

That's why I'm turning to you, Derek: I won by just 2 points in 2016, and I cannot afford to miss this goal or lose any ground. Races in Nevada are always tough, so I'm counting on you.

I wouldn't ask you personally like this if it weren't important. I need to raise another $6,275 by midnight – and I can't miss this goal. **With Senate control on the line, every single dollar today could mean the difference between winning and losing tomorrow.**

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66936efc090b41bfb97dd8a070d362b6&_e=WblOi2qV09UVP1ZktpRhMUMMqEQRdnsXZd9WXVcNWJi09lNxn8afaFPSIqS4fNOTknEBsot8FsEpul4K2e6TtSk_OBJMANtgfEuCOKqfW66wqA-7nPES16S4JLyPH12x_nxNBGxUN1ncliARu3B8NzOcNxsWHJ3pzV2fJ_RXx0SRdceSWLdE7lLt6TLHuOk7mJw40r3Z4zx5scMz4be2m2xJdXU5TWnWOGAURTaREE0otDxJcyCWY5R5XW4srFNkniNJeeE5dzM4GoKeVZTS7l5iL9cBjG0IEVgCXfTP6oi-uKzLIvx3TT3yK9ctONdevGrpncIxFNAz5wZBKVlAzjiUo9W4E0tjl8sqFQwXVljvknxrwQfKYnM-RZ4nJ6Fq8w31nVmtERl5AZGuJbUnT_XtFVZJochFiTKk5DTOtVfdGuV3f8dOjdZmvqWLcT-9Y4iIHbTcyR3Sp7y9JOGDnSnNTOx-aE6LUh-Tjit4Z1g%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66936efc090b41bfb97dd8a070d362b6&_e=WblOi2qV09UVP1ZktpRhMUMMqEQRdnsXZd9WXVcNWJi09lNxn8afaFPSIqS4fNOTknEBsot8FsEpul4K2e6TtSk_OBJMANtgfEuCOKqfW66wqA-7nPES16S4JLyPH12x_nxNBGxUN1ncliARu3B8NzOcNxsWHJ3pzV2fJ_RXx0SRdceSWLdE7lLt6TLHuOk7mJw40r3Z4zx5scMz4be2m2xJdXU5TWnWOGAURTaREE0otDxJcyCWY5R5XW4srFNkniNJeeE5dzM4GoKeVZTS7mOeX1VxQu4B6G-LXnufHivUFA1CIsPYlz3VKks0Fu2MFj36d2aDpHmf3PxuKp-3yuUHIXW7mn_7A9ypbXuCyPH8vd0qKMhqfBEXNpJpYNcGUZVyXfcFsvqs6QT0h5ZF4vb0K_w2nRHdxm0bba5TYJAMZ51qExUFmPISNcaUxt74xVRF2TrQUZcm5OPivfl_Ih-V5MKbLPiM-rLwZos6Yhc%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66936efc090b41bfb97dd8a070d362b6&_e=WblOi2qV09UVP1ZktpRhMUMMqEQRdnsXZd9WXVcNWJi09lNxn8afaFPSIqS4fNOTknEBsot8FsEpul4K2e6TtSk_OBJMANtgfEuCOKqfW66wqA-7nPES16S4JLyPH12x_nxNBGxUN1ncliARu3B8NzOcNxsWHJ3pzV2fJ_RXx0SRdceSWLdE7lLt6TLHuOk7mJw40r3Z4zx5scMz4be2m2xJdXU5TWnWOGAURTaREE0otDxJcyCWY5R5XW4srFNkniNJeeE5dzM4GoKeVZTS7uutQVXN41wGWxh-95rbwgFi3tQ_PhF0-d7iIzTHBF7D1T9YJzXy67s834NZYx60CpgE7puBZtgDhbjLllTkr6D2CZfzBmYSwKgNV2Jng1fOIak1Xo-iUUkZxDh_Pu5mU7Nj4NxO3eKkU1k5W7Q_23QNSUx_VMVQW7cFYIp_P983wpBW9B7gMBEf2zHQD0_TOrWyr7_bTgkuYB2oPE0xU0Y%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66936efc090b41bfb97dd8a070d362b6&_e=WblOi2qV09UVP1ZktpRhMUMMqEQRdnsXZd9WXVcNWJi09lNxn8afaFPSIqS4fNOTknEBsot8FsEpul4K2e6TtSk_OBJMANtgfEuCOKqfW66wqA-7nPES16S4JLyPH12x_nxNBGxUN1ncliARu3B8NzOcNxsWHJ3pzV2fJ_RXx0SRdceSWLdE7lLt6TLHuOk7mJw40r3Z4zx5scMz4be2m2xJdXU5TWnWOGAURTaREE0otDxJcyCWY5R5XW4srFNkniNJeeE5dzM4GoKeVZTS7jBMueItfY5Drm5FKH7r8TPzhiV-Pg7YRLnA6k8Wa7o9tOJ7QNjg2izwFz3kuDgFeGpBcOv-Ie17wpRt2Eo946lZljtqcUxuIzWiwpPBwkhOdLar0htzcCxGMoY6zIdCOAznWD9YjLjlVs1meOFLhjEdOgULJy4zjY0zKC8MbNv-s4xOR8yuBGawF78oE42uSYcSD88YPI_DHg1LewO7E40%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66936efc090b41bfb97dd8a070d362b6&_e=WblOi2qV09UVP1ZktpRhMUMMqEQRdnsXZd9WXVcNWJi09lNxn8afaFPSIqS4fNOTknEBsot8FsEpul4K2e6TtSk_OBJMANtgfEuCOKqfW66wqA-7nPES16S4JLyPH12x_nxNBGxUN1ncliARu3B8NzOcNxsWHJ3pzV2fJ_RXx0SRdceSWLdE7lLt6TLHuOk7mJw40r3Z4zx5scMz4be2m2xJdXU5TWnWOGAURTaREE0otDxJcyCWY5R5XW4srFNkniNJeeE5dzM4GoKeVZTS7t-a50mFCla5EVZP-I-VpzIGOhimdABlDytAhdffxXSh5maXcGpQ6LiiluML5K8Z3ElA8MuEsbY_upPAVjrkeEGsS80N49Ac_U-MRIoGAERMQK3ggN4o58he6YnU5mx84BfsxnVanIwFEa5Dhu35SyM44CFTzdBlmDRJFKB1qXxHPKzRgpjX568245lh8MjPXlzAvsDSyvWNNQ7AOPGSwtA%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66936efc090b41bfb97dd8a070d362b6&_e=WblOi2qV09UVP1ZktpRhMUMMqEQRdnsXZd9WXVcNWJi09lNxn8afaFPSIqS4fNOTknEBsot8FsEpul4K2e6TtSk_OBJMANtgfEuCOKqfW66wqA-7nPES16S4JLyPH12x_nxNBGxUN1ncliARu3B8NzOcNxsWHJ3pzV2fJ_RXx0SRdceSWLdE7lLt6TLHuOk7mJw40r3Z4zx5scMz4be2m2xJdXU5TWnWOGAURTaREE0otDxJcyCWY5R5XW4srFNkniNJeeE5dzM4GoKeVZTS7jgVukS1uN-ApGZ70aar7NvvMrdRGkQ7UgNxCSn-xiSR-z0JYssnkcE16L5HIAdui_79A8lrIbPWMAyPl4vQSszNUn-Jf9-aATvX5qZXR-yTsTi8dQIvX0xZd680t6nkw2-afRaP2uPABSJ2ZIHnKSAMIdzmBtgVGUfybQm1OQ2cI3fQeva-E7xcuKLfGGW5pyIImlI51Ic5tx7ZvFGf48U%3D)
Herschel Walker

subject: Transparency is dead
body:

_Sponsored message_
It seems like transparency and accountability have already fallen by the wayside. We know the Biden administration demanding questions from the media ahead of interviews.

Transparency and accountability.

Dear Conservative Friends-

It seems like transparency and accountability have already fallen by the wayside. We know the Biden administration demanding questions from the media ahead of interviews. It seems like we're falling further behind, faster and faster.

**We started[CaucusRoom.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoj7o6sl1u2o00hkva01hfbuso7hikvqc03ub7h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chieeor4c3h2bs)**, a social media network exclusively for conservatives, because we think things like transparency and accountability still matter. CaucusRoom is a place for conservatives to network, encourage, and engage away from big tech.

It's time we have a space for ourselves where we can talk about what we believe without interference from liberal trolls or anonymous accounts.

So, join [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2pr567cpknjp4edmejmi8pjavss8d4erptig0o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chieeor4c3h2bs) today. It's free to join, and we won't share any of your information with anyone, ever.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m ready to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895951:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)

[
](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58895952:sibRxQHwN:m:1:2247059263:60F649559B66E982A10670CFB49E9935:r)

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but {{unsubscribeUrl}}. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 25, 2020. subject: Looking back on a stellar September

body:
It wouldn’t be possible without you
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36915123/309519746/-846547794?refcode=em_eng_2021.10.02_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NWM3Ni1hZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFo5t-53QC0zi-GEM-Y5KYhsmyH0e4MYevQJU6XAvUs=)
Hey Peter, it's Liz.

I want to share some good news with you -- we’ve made it past our first FEC deadline and, thanks to supporters like you, we were able to surpass our online fundraising goal! Because I can count on supporters like you to step up, I was able to put my focus on connecting with Iowans and listening to what matters most to them.

I’ve enclosed some highlights from the campaign trail -- events, trips, and **visits that were all made possible by supporters like you.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36915124/309519748/-846547794?refcode=em_eng_2021.10.02_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NWM3Ni1hZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFo5t-53QC0zi-GEM-Y5KYhsmyH0e4MYevQJU6XAvUs=)
_Hitched a ride with 7th generation farmer James Garnant on one of the best harvest days of the season!_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36915125/309519760/-846547794?refcode=em_eng_2021.10.02_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NWM3Ni1hZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFo5t-53QC0zi-GEM-Y5KYhsmyH0e4MYevQJU6XAvUs=)
_Met some of the cutest Iowans at the Marshalltown parade!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36915126/309519761/-846547794?refcode=em_eng_2021.10.02_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NWM3Ni1hZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFo5t-53QC0zi-GEM-Y5KYhsmyH0e4MYevQJU6XAvUs=)
And, of course, attended the annual Steak Fry hosted by the Polk County Democrats. _
I’ve committed to running the _right_ way -- by putting rubber to the road and meeting voters where they are across the district. Visiting with community members in Iowa’s First District and hearing their stories isn’t just one of the most critical parts of my campaign, it’s also my favorite.

Over the next year, I am going to be traveling the state, meeting with voters, and working hard to earn every vote, and it is your support that continues to make it possible.

Thank you for being in my corner,

Liz Mathis
_Candidate for Congress_

P.S. If you weren’t able to donate before our FEC deadline, you can still chip in to help us get a jumpstart on our next goal: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct-2021**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36915127/309519765/-846547794?refcode=em_eng_2021.10.02_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NWM3Ni1hZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFo5t-53QC0zi-GEM-Y5KYhsmyH0e4MYevQJU6XAvUs=)
| | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [LizMathis.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36915128/309519767/-618171382?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NWM3Ni1hZjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFo5t-53QC0zi-GEM-Y5KYhsmyH0e4MYevQJU6XAvUs=&emci=91b77162-f822-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=c1d55c76-af23-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=6566505)

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8851%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=U8JJDi%2fAtgjs8u0L9fiTsw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15595%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=newlFQfqwk8rSwztLsuDLA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15595%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=newlFQfqwk8rSwztLsuDLA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15596%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A1LvKwU8wtMOfadDHaz2EA&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8851%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=U8JJDi%2fAtgjs8u0L9fiTsw&sysid=1)_

name: Never Again PAC
subject: It was an exciting September
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
New subpoenas were issued in the House investigation, including for Mark Meadows and Steve Bannon. Former Pennsylvania governor Ed Rendell was announced as chairman of our strategic advisory committee. We rushed support to Terry McAuliffe in his important Virginia governor's race. body:
I am excited that we are together building a movement to take on corporate interests and deliver for the people of western Pennsylvania.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36915784/309522348/1796049497?refcode=EM_C_211002TY_N_CD_4_G_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjg1ZTlmNi1iMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-JgE4leDXAxCLghZJwBmzaUFvLikDM_i1XOCavfU2o=)

Derek,

**I am proud to announce that we met our goal for the first public fundraising period of our campaign.**

I've been overwhelmed by the support we've gotten since launching just over a month ago. It's gone a long way toward showing that we're ready to compete in one of the closest House districts in the country by running proudly on the simple idea that our common good ought to come first.

The fight to keep PA-17 blue has just begun, but already, we are off to an amazing start. I am excited to continue this journey with you, and build a movement to take on corporate interests and deliver for the people of western Pennsylvania.

Thanks so much,

Chris

P.S. If you're in the area, I hope you can join us tomorrow for our campaign's official kick-off picnic! I'll be speaking to supporters about our progress so far, and the next steps we'll be taking to grow our support across the district. [](mailto:caitlin@chrisforpa.com?subject=Re%3A%20campaign%20kick-off%20picnic) | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. clean_body: We can’t let him win | | | = | | Derek, Donald Trump just got some good news. News reports are saying early voting is down across Virginia due to plummeting Democratic enthusiasm. That’s bad news for Virginia. But it’s GREAT news for Donald Trump. Why? Trump has endorsed Glenn Youngkin 4 times. FOUR. Youngkin even said he’s voting for him in 2024 during last week’s debate. Trump knows that a Republican win in this race is a huge step forward for his 2024 comeback. He’s loving the news that Democrats aren’t turning out to make sure Terry wins. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Here’s why your immediate support is so important. Right now, we’re being outraised, which means that our team doesn't have the resources they need to out-organize Trump’s candidate. The RNC has already spent millions on Youngkin’s ground-game. If we have any shot at matching their effort, it will be because we had a mammoth response from our grassroots team. = Thank you, Team Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Chip in anything you can now to support Derek’s campaign.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f979833a5dc42cf852ffab18f741048&_e=tyAjfj1W8LmZb0PNZ_8-h3kboBH9A1TxV1Zpw4KuRx7aGvCpR0guth_nYegfe0mKKXsmz7vYOOzkorB5qSutWLJ5ojYAUG4CakZBAdb7pSAJ0CwI_j-x1QbMPjjy-9yLMOE4l2tQWhsHPZEbpa27ruyb_Xm3SfKyy4d8fEHdO7eQE7wjGD1OGGfLJvtopHQF-CjOxCcA4zj16lC_tr1VbeDbAvFxLz9-dwlEAf9tU6UOtHF1ehjf6eLY9j2qnIIpLswbMicDQQ6kBV5oSwXsy2TqCDdJRPECvSyBHnAYj-RO20sdiNi0OQBx_wxjf9HUrOmtw9u7Oo5b15VyJcDQ6xEU4WOagnBwhwkzudW3L1H9S18SqUjMvAtjiTuPCUPVm4VPvnG0kkAxc-XShhJFcGPdoeZIUSmon6zfUzxwbQzTEsTKWtd8W0E1nz8EeNJZu6ttYTlImm-t-1Ec9HyVMEsLDeni5KPyjHSm7h2MnHC2BRAV_9X6BWKPID5H73MW) Check out some of what each of the Speakers had to say about Derek: _“Derek Schmidt is a strong, effective leader who has the right values and always puts the needs of Kansans ahead of his own. He is exactly who we need in the governor’s office to get our state back on the right track and to fix the problems caused by our current governor.” _ **_– Ray Merrick, 2013-2017_** _“They say that the best qualification for a new job is success at your old job, and Derek’s work as our state’s attorney general is unparalleled.”_ **_– Mike O'Neal , 2009-2013 _** _“Kansas desperately needs new leadership in the governor’s office and Derek Schmidt is the right person for the job.”_ **_– Doug Mays, 2003-2007_** _“Kansas needs a governor who will work with our Legislature and sign into law important bills that reflect the priorities of Kansans, not veto them. Derek Schmidt has a great track record of standing up for Kansas values as Attorney General and Senate Majority Leader.”_ **_– Robin Jennison, 1999-2001_** _“I’ve known Derek Schmidt for a very long time and was one of his original supporters in his first campaign for attorney general. He will make a_ _n excellent governor for our state and I’m proud to support him in this campaign.”_ **_– Tim Shallenburger, 1995-1999_** Derek also received endorsements from several additional current and former Kansas leaders across our state: _“Derek Schmidt is a tremendous Kansan and the right person to lead our state in today’s society. I’m proud to endorse him to be the next Governor of Kansas.”_ **_– Mary Jean Eisenhower, Humanitarian and Granddaughter of Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower, 34th U.S. President_** _"Derek Schmidt is a great attorney general, and we've been so lucky to have his leadership here in Kansas. He's always been a strong supporter of our Second Amendment and the right to bear arms. I'm excited and honored to endorse him today and it will be wonderful to invite Derek to our Freedom Shoot in 2023 as our Kansas Governor."_ **_– Treatha Brown-Foster, Executive Board Member, Kansas Black Republican Council_** _"I’m supporting Derek Schmidt for Governor because he’s the law and order candidate in this race who will support law enforcement and protect the people and communities of our great state. He’s done it throughout his whole career, and I know he’ll continue to Back the Blue every single day as governor."_ _ _ **_– Don Ash, Wyandotte County Sheriff_** _"I've known Derek Schmidt for many years and have always admired his hard work and dedication to Kansas. He's a genuine conservative who will make a great leader for our state."_ **_– Jene Vickrey, Former Kansas House Majority Leader_** It’s clear that Kansans overwhelmingly support Derek Schmidt to be their next Governor, but now, we need every single Kansas Patriot to join us in our fight against the Far-Left mega donors bankrolling Laura Kelly’s campaign. **[Will you chip in now to help fight back against the Far Left and elect Derek Schmidt as our next Governor?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f979833a5dc42cf852ffab18f741048&_e=tyAjfj1W8LmZb0PNZ_8-h3kboBH9A1TxV1Zpw4KuRx7aGvCpR0guth_nYegfe0mKKXsmz7vYOOzkorB5qSutWLJ5ojYAUG4CakZBAdb7pSAJ0CwI_j-x1QbMPjjy-9yLMOE4l2tQWhsHPZEbpa27ruyb_Xm3SfKyy4d8fEHdO7eQE7wjGD1OGGfLJvtopHQF-CjOxCcA4zj16lC_tr1VbeDbAvFxLz9-dwlEAf9tU6UOtHF1ehjf6eLY9j2qnIIpLswbMicDQQ6kBV5oSwXsy2TqCDdJRPECvSyBHnAYj-S1w_rmm_a-Y8ZMvYRU3yy8biLgVX96sbbGMDIRB6rpEg03kawOc7giPWiD5-pOEjiJNyp9YFNYbWJcSkn-Dhf8YmwSK7BSFVqEjDbM5xC0iz87zFlYzmarC-D5SOrCLycwcnSFWrXhckV_ei_X6y3pFkkxe1MTL-cd9naeccDs3kP3zs2-OLspLDLPmL33UMFUeL8j6DgA9MGJoX6EaWsv)** [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f979833a5dc42cf852ffab18f741048&_e=tyAjfj1W8LmZb0PNZ_8-h3kboBH9A1TxV1Zpw4KuRx7aGvCpR0guth_nYegfe0mKKXsmz7vYOOzkorB5qSutWLJ5ojYAUG4CakZBAdb7pSAJ0CwI_j-x1QbMPjjy-9yLMOE4l2tQWhsHPZEbpa27ruyb_Xm3SfKyy4d8fEHdO7eQE7wjGD1OGGfLJvtopHQF-CjOxCcA4zj16lC_tr1VbeDbAvFxLz9-dwlEAf9tU6UOtHF1ehjf6eLY9j2qnIIpLswbMicDQQ6kBV5oSwXsy2TqCDdJRPECvSyBHnAYj-RvEY9b32E_mm_Wyq3_53H3riSX-jKQQ7dKE09l1Y5IcFmXlgdWXPoYLOrc9R4YAqn3ZPc2teUJ0HAT5YZOJq38Dg3KoJQ1hb1BVqalEQAvFPs1JEKrT3Z46RRoGVmeiQ5WdOuoeN2rbO2dQ1FrJj-JH_t1S2RTI4ZJyaqk6U4DoXxaHwywGrfcdnx6vSJ840c9JpWOmCfqCwUkweSuu6IY) Thanks, Team Schmidt | |

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Hi, it's Alex. I'm writing to say thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
As long as folks like you stay involved, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
#

Hi, it's Alex.
I wanted to reach out for a minute and thank you directly for your support.
Now that we’ve defeated the Republican recall attempt, the same coalition of far-right, anti-mask, anti-vax, and anti-immigrant Trump supporters are going to set their sights directly on our campaign.
But as long as we stand together, I know that this grassroots movement has what it takes to beat back anything Republicans throw our way and continue building on the progress we’ve made here in California.
So just know that whenever you donate $5 or $10, that is what gives us the resources to go up against these radical special interests who want to defeat us.
The months ahead are going to be critical for building a movement strong enough to win this race next fall. And we've got a lot of work to do before then, because you can bet that Republicans will be fired up and ready to spend whatever it takes to stop our movement.
But as long as folks like you stay involved, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
Whether you are donating or volunteering or adding your name to support our fight for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, or voting rights — every action you take supports this campaign and this movement. And I want you to know that I’m so grateful for everything you contribute to this team.
Thank you, again. I can’t imagine doing this without you.
\- Alex Padilla
* * *
If you’re able, please consider making a donation to help keep our grassroots campaign going.
We need to keep up the pace in 2021, and anything you can afford to give now will go a long way toward getting us off to a strong start in October. [**If you can, please make a donation today >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211002-1-15&t=2&refcode2=371_159979_WCxijG&akid=371%2E159979%2EWCxijG)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211002-1-15&t=3&refcode2=371_159979_WCxijG&akid=371%2E159979%2EWCxijG)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=371%2E159979%2EWCxijG)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Witt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: I will NEVER stop fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Patrick Witt for Congress
body:
Thank you for signing up | | | | [ ](https://patrickwitt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=776ede99b48702dfd47b28eb8&id=f3f5e2154d&e=d77f98215b)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Thank you for signing up to join my America First team.

I grew up on the football field so I know I can’t win a game or a political race without a great team behind me. I’m so grateful to have your support and confidence.

Now, I have to warn you. **This is going to be a vicious race.** There are people in Georgia and Washington who don’t want to see an outspoken, pro-Trump, anti-Establishment fighter like me win this race.

The liberals and DC elite saw the work I did in the Trump administration fighting back against Critical Race Theory, and **they are terrified of what I might do in Congress.** The RINOs and the Georgia establishment saw the work I did as part of President Trump’s post-election legal team in Georgia, fighting against fraud, and **they want to keep people like me silent. **

They just want to forget the countless examples of Democrat fraud and move on.

Well, I’m not interested in moving on and surrendering. **My promise to you is that I will NEVER stop fighting. **

**Fighting Cancel Culture.**
**Fighting the radical Left.**
**Fighting the special interests.
Fighting for the integrity of our elections.**

We still have several months until the primary, but there are a few very important things you can do to help our campaign.

**1) Follow me on [Facebook](https://patrickwitt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=776ede99b48702dfd47b28eb8&id=0bea853d48&e=d77f98215b), [Twitter](https://patrickwitt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=776ede99b48702dfd47b28eb8&id=6a3d8b1036&e=d77f98215b), and [Instagram](https://patrickwitt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=776ede99b48702dfd47b28eb8&id=8e6cd0d188&e=d77f98215b).** It’s also a great way to keep up with the campaign’s daily activities.

**2)** Tell your friends and family members about this race and **[encourage them to sign up to join our America First team](https://patrickwitt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=776ede99b48702dfd47b28eb8&id=69a69e2f6e&e=d77f98215b).**

**3) If you’re able,[ I’d be honored if you could make a donation](https://patrickwitt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=776ede99b48702dfd47b28eb8&id=f3f5e2154d&e=d77f98215b). **Even $10 or $15 will make a big difference. There are several deep-pocketed candidates in this race, and I will have to rely on the support of grassroots conservatives like you to get my message out.

Thank you so much for joining our team. I look forward to hearing from you and hopefully seeing you in person out on the campaign trail.

God bless you and your family,
---
| [ ](https://patrickwitt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=776ede99b48702dfd47b28eb8&id=f3f5e2154d&e=d77f98215b)
---

[**Election Day is exactly one month from today, and my team tells me we need 397 donations by midnight to sustain our strong momentum. Peter, I know $1 doesn’t sound like a lot.

$1 is less than a gallon of gas, less than a cup of coffee, and less than a pack of gummy bears (_my favorite snack during legislative sessions!_).

**But for our grassroots campaign, $1 is more than enough.** It powers me and my team to travel the extra mile across the Commonwealth, knock on more doors, and do what really matters — reaching Virginia voters where they’re at.

And now is the time to donate. **We’re in the final stretch in our campaign to build upon our Democratic progress and fend off extremist Republicans like my opponent.**

[**I’m ready to serve you as Lt. Governor, but I can’t get there without your support. This means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll join 396 other supporters in donating $1 today to help me win this crucial election!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36918675/309533196/-1547699132?amount=1&amounts=1,5,10,25,50,100&refcode=HAFV_20211002_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDExMTZhMy1jMTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0wfz1_qvt9HWr_w4XfeJQw-Kkds2tiAmoF09n-u6aI4=)

Dear Friend,
**Thank You for joining Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor!**
Your support is greatly appreciated. Our campaign team will be reaching out soon regarding events, merchandise, signs, volunteer opportunities, and other exciting news about the **Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor** campaign.Please stay tuned, and in the meantime, please [**visit our website**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b631713e45&e=823fa8e224), [**Like us on Facebook**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=94b043f7d6&e=823fa8e224), [**Follow Janice McGeachin on Twitter**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=278e0a877f&e=823fa8e224), and — if you have the means — please consider [**donating to the campaign**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d37dd83f70&e=823fa8e224). Anything you can do to help is valuable and makes a difference. Working together, we will restore the foundational principles that have Made Idaho Great including [individual liberty](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c541a1e7be&e=823fa8e224), [state sovereignty](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=412a9a1161&e=823fa8e224), and [traditional conservative values](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=61d8d724db&e=823fa8e224).Thank you again for your support. Sincerely,
The Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Team

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjg5026b4sm62olqg89es4oq167dqj49bpd2volg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9g61ob4c5h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztqjaiqkme25ua27ls383nllemhigbal6h4u3b10_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9g61ob4c5h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl27kc3aamcnupbndkrbijov23a8iv7pk64qd758_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9g61ob4c5h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z43boh4k4b7e33vdfbdpnk0a2tn1ehcfrsj09geg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9g61ob4c5h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbdq60pu250hbv74ceunn3es9np012ot00nut2e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9g61ob4c5h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmmrpqi7b0jc3mpucalaahr43jjm0qinnubqjoc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c9g61ob4c5h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Thank you from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
From the bottom of my heart, I am just so grateful to everyone on this team.
#

THANK YOU!
From the bottom of my heart, I am just so grateful to everyone on this team.
We not only reached our goal for the third quarter, but we exceeded it! We’re still working to add up and confirm the final number, but we should all be so proud of what we accomplished as a team.
When we report our number, it is going to be an unmistakable message that Democrats across the country are fired up to turn North Carolina blue. We can prove that we have the resources and depth of support necessary to go toe-to-toe with any of our Republican opponents.
My mom, Lou Beasley, always told me that with hard work and faith we could accomplish anything. Together, we are proving that, and when we win, we will open the doors of opportunity for so many of our families who have been ignored or forgotten for too long.
I know there are many days that Washington seems so broken, and frankly, I share your frustration. But if we keep the faith and dig deep, we can win this race, and when we do, we can win meaningful, progressive change — on voting rights, reproductive justice, a $15 minimum wage, climate change and more.
That’s really what is at stake in 2022, and North Carolina has a critical role to play in these fights. Everything you are doing to support our campaign is putting us one step closer to victory.
Thank you again. For everything. I hope you have a great weekend, and I’ll see you on the trail!
\- Cheri Beasley

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: The Washington Post, NBC & Huffington Post are noticing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
News outlets and people across America are taking notice.
#
Peter, people everywhere are talking about Pramila’s leadership. She’s leading the Progressive Caucus to ensure that Democrats deliver President Biden’s popular Build Back Better agenda for the people so we don’t leave working families and our communities behind.
_Check out what Huffington Post said:_
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)
_And NBC News:_
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)
**[Chip in so Pramila and the Progressive Caucus can keep flexing our muscle and deliver real change for the people »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)**
_AND the Washington Post:_
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)
We can’t do this urgent work without Pramila’s Progressive teammates, like Rep. Ilhan Omar who had this to say about Pramila:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)
**[Support Pramila’s progressive leadership with a contribution today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)**
It’s important to remember that progressives in Congress didn’t always have this kind of political power. Journalists have been summing that up, showing how Pramila’s leadership is changing the progressive fight in Congress and delivering for the people.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)
**Pramila and progressives aren’t giving in — and folks are noticing that.** We held the line to ensure Democrats in Congress can expand Medicare, secure universal child care, pre-K, and community college, fight climate change, invest in affordable housing, and so much more. And we will continue this fight because it’s too important to slow down or back down.
[**Chip in $3 or anything at all to fuel Pramila’s fight for progressive policies. We are stronger today because of the movement we’ve built together over the last several years. We can’t stop now, Peter.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7257?refcode=em20211002-688&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=27&akid=688%2E420207%2EwMQvko)

In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

clean_body: News outlets and people across America are taking notice. Peter, people everywhere are talking about Pramila’s leadership. She’s leading the Progressive Caucus to ensure that Democrats deliver President Biden’s popular Build Back Better agenda for the people so we don’t leave working families and our communities behind. Check out what Huffington Post said: And NBC News: AND the Washington Post: We can’t do this urgent work without Pramila’s Progressive teammates, like Rep. Ilhan Omar who had this to say about Pramila: It’s important to remember that progressives in Congress didn’t always have this kind of political power. Journalists have been summing that up, showing how Pramila’s leadership is changing the progressive fight in Congress and delivering for the people. Pramila and progressives aren’t giving in — and folks are noticing that. We held the line to ensure Democrats in Congress can expand Medicare, secure universal child care, pre-K, and community college, fight climate change, invest in affordable housing, and so much more. And we will continue this fight because it’s too important to slow down or back down. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Tim Ryan
subject: personally thanking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1055%2E3611125%2Eu9d4Mo ][IMG]

I want to thank you personally, folks. We needed to raise
$100,000 from online grassroots supporters before our end-of-quarter
deadline on Thursday and my staff just told me that we didn’t meet our
goal...

...we blew it out of the water!

This is a grassroots movement and without your support, we wouldn’t have
the resources we need to flip Ohio blue. Every dollar
counts, folks.

Listen, this campaign is far from over. I’ve lived in Ohio my entire life
and I’ve seen firsthand how workers and families have been cut out of the
deal. I’m running for Senate to change that.

There’s no doubt about it: this will be a tough race and if we’re going to
win, we need to build a grassroots movement that’s got the stuff to take
on Republican billionaires and dark-money groups. And it starts with
you, friend. I’m so grateful to have you on this team.

Together, we’ll flip this Senate seat blue and expand our Democratic
majority.

So again, thank you.

-- Tim

P.S. I know we send you a lot of emails. But it’s clear Republicans will
stop at nothing to keep this Senate seat red. The fight continues and I
need you more than ever. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4963?t=1007&akid=1055%2E3611125%2Eu9d4Mo ]If you’re able, will you donate to help us
keep up our momentum?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4963?t=1008&akid=1055%2E3611125%2Eu9d4Mo ]Donate a Custom Amount →

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Georgia on my mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a08V1B3xtAi3MtSNQ9RxqSMKIxZIy-YJVaLY2sniUUq7XCtLv8SD0My6Tf7nxLhEDqjm0yUx-BMH-XO30KajO8rlJ8SbL3unxXAT-TUcnEahSaZ_4ODQ9hocTxKZ4rDcXldhrjAsw-vR-mbRmxvYZRRn1tWu2YB2OOs6qTKSTmCxae_VVMoM8JhWdTY4pPQuCezqm0FTxxkgrQD1USllnASc%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a0_YSYdKNAkH-I0GVVyocoXosj-iUsHVkTWIZ59P2_-ZrfGV-43wUQYFbRJ8MPNmVikS5hbEML3eiXYNuYQj9A7Fs8fsej44OylwMaRRroF9enuM1m4rZ3VSBh7ip5ww6OQ6aSfQJZKC5eSL7w1B9xOJ_aNiINPzz7lw9FXs6doDKwNYvUFKT_hpZk5vuGt6W5INad0OfWWXGTSO-CBDsQX0%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a0wksyUl6PGUxz1WxE_zCgxuLguzHOZE_bf2O8qJocsT0Ii_1ds2sp7ENsUmrPA0bBxJ3S3-Vxg22T6s4MlM84ZfgHMPY_PgUsMte8Wf5iA2XFectSQpxM_TaaS0Y17n8wYc55CxeP7IAm5tmuKdmkB0rwPKjU8H0xAnDMHVJU8G5xgtScTeeh7P3smy4Oowo1RjxRzkbapFPMSMxQp3PUT0%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a06SpztccwJFEGIVOfHF1ipl-Uyg-K6On9mpKQMu5Zb6NFLEnvYFMFX6pBAu0M5CsHkzCUg3qdpg7ODbUTRvWiy-bYXzz_Tk0Bn4oB78E0Ft8pSW5frgSaxYmL8irgEUQ47DOhycVnK3vOBTb_Nw3PXTubmqqKpVXsU5hw1ouJPjlqwyFPSeyaRwXIFP1vOuEnzDiFe2vD5-OjKLwbQze42o%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a03RYzCQdbcAeyV5FXaI36DGJqFCiOlQRLWNn5zvVRxAZS7ipmro4cWjGYtxFtyD6yrKKEvVghtziJG65Y1Lv4rqtd51EphcNhPfUwYbVRJMvsdsqGUvt_8iqdTOZ58DnDIPaxcwErIdc5ZkUPyz8KhmVUw0KNEdzU0YAR9dWT_Fap1s7IFkWWhMvLFtK8wBz5FgkttTE8I4E5W41EIO0u1c%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a0yJAWl4sz_dkKCOe14SigGJKQA5KvJRR_0rHrUtKtkHQ7urFSsqph_eEFFDnLyJNfkUOd1L3Rk2WQqNCfUKoT8op4nNR4ier4fJfBvkz_oGTCbpxz0DqsOvNFZTmQoRGuTZ1YTT3H1FdEDja1Xd8bv8Ik2pZw82MLverXJo7DnuTQUq3x059BWDvVCJ_JnfvAD0PRdNAZdNVXrVgI2L0Ns4%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a051D3WxorXUmwF0SUfsCgqKJnsLWMvlAPX82Xj676inGmqFi1uEoQwXnU4YEgS7XczSHXKrRYgmDaQzKHa8ClIIOeEkgHTzNpNj44IXHAUGxizknIP9N14xYuZ57BHAAqo3jF57Rwyks-LklHblNqFSn22KeIuixzrkwwE1hEvxyFxTTMusyAs9WsLZF6qClFSgXLEUjRYFZYd-rDSI3GuA%3D)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e202e3c9a7a4c6ba69065deb703ed17&_e=YsbQ-2TvX6aCIQujWUdHRqz6PmlLAzrT_q0zYWsAkTH1lUBbMf3B_r_PyMewUR4eiFtRxv6oXFEjJroZoOEnkUBXhwhE2SXnaaH77ChnuBVn5E1OVAmRI7avMUNximSwXGuNHfXrpl-A147LFBPmfzTjihqeqtSoybevMDvLZtm1wfUak22ZEHGC6V4ssKZVxGHcu5bxTs1r2ZTJxGqviYv5Y-fIJq7K-SersGCv6I1UccrrVXIALJfHMEvD23JJnOqpLQGDdY6RoX_sdi1a0yii3_y0oPulZ_r4ZFHd5zC9gzK-fN_F-OD0B5ODyCqEOjWPaLSYHPORDEqI7tEKItbiQtJbjY-2d_eJwvKCn7EPjqvASy_Q-YGVzbFAvdwV2QPCKmkELYlyRXnG8HVOXNygfS67J8UEr9QyM4Zef6ikKDXqeY1O4m4dCyJqA1Y9qc83CHstmqWQAkIImNAUO8CYN-gccqy1OnIQzWjh5bk%3D)

[
