name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Hillsdale College now offers our full online course “The Second World Wars” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c461%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9SM59OQEBkRLT8eBLbqUAA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66850%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XcG4paZeubqhlIDdTCJl1g&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College now offers our full online course **“The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set** for your home library or to give as a gift. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66850%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XcG4paZeubqhlIDdTCJl1g&sysid=1) If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of **“The Second World Wars”** using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66851%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trkgCU%2bK9CwtfDIcbfNn5Q&sysid=1)** Thank you for defending liberty through education with Hillsdale College. | | Derek,

Virginia’s gubernatorial race is critical to the future of the Commonwealth and the future of the country. With the election just one month away, we must all do our part to help my friend Terry win.

We see it across the country: Governors can stop attacks on our most fundamental rights as Americans. But right-wing governors take their states backward. With voting rights and reproductive freedom on the line for Virginians, we cannot take anything for granted. Poll after poll shows the race is essentially tied.

subject: 100% Pro-Choice. Always.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRENT HENNRICH FOR WA**](https://www
body:
When it comes to being "Pro Choice" | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and th
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7dNn29s4D/c?w=aSNAArl80r0g_OCDDmRAoOE9T6BqDOyS3uZuosoi2JE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vc28vN2RObjI5czREP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON!
---
| |
---
| | When it comes to being "Pro Choice"
---
| | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and their access to care. No one has a right to stand between them and the choices they can make about their own healthcare. This is not a stance I take lightly, it stems from a decision I had to make on behalf of my wife and I. To say that she would not be alive today without unfettered access to that care is the absolute truth, not hyperbole. On October 25th, 2012, my wife lay bleeding on a hospital bed. She was 20 weeks pregnant with our second child, a little girl we would name Addison, and had suffered a placental abruption. The long and short of the tale is she was hemorrhaging blood faster than her dedicated healthcare team could replace it.
---
| | | [**Donate today to help me fight to keep reproductive care legal and safe.**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7dNn29s4D/c?w=BBBEy5NDS7Y6bu3Azvr8gyHFDE-IfJOMxOa5oxyfG-A.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDM_cmVmY29kZT1wcm9jaG9pY2VlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MjUwIiwiciI6IjZmZDkyOTYwLTA3YzItNDNiOS00YmEzLWM1ZTk1NDU3MzU1OSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | I was informed of two options - I could hope and pray for a miracle while my wife and unborn child bled out, or they could induce labor, saving Amber (my wife) and we would be able hold our daughter ( Addison ) as she faded over the next few hours. Time slowed to a crawl, and in that agonizing instant I considered every possibly conceivable outcome. Praying for a “miracle” wasn’t an option while my wife lay at death’s door. The choice was clear. I had to save my wife and we could hold our daughter while she faded. The Supreme Court decided to protect a woman’s right to choose on January 22nd, 1973. (Roe V Wade) Since that adjudication, that decision has been attacke. It has been dissected and challenged time and time again from every conceivable angle. Roe V Wade was not simply a judgment in favor of a person’s right to bodily autonomy. It allows educated healthcare professionals and informed families the option to choose a treatment that aligns with all of the factors they face, in ANY GIVEN HEALTHCARE SITUATION. There is no doubt that the drug (Pitocin) administered to my wife was done in her best interest, and as such saved her life. However, that drug has come under scrutiny in relation to labor induced terminations.Medicine is by far an imperfect science, and it is impossible to foresee every probability. With this ideal in mind, there can be no uncrossable line in the potential care of anyone, in any conceivable situation. No line can be drawn that covers any and all eventualities. No Doctor, no Nurse, no physicians assistant should hold sway over judgement of care at any point. That is why all potential avenues of reproductive care must be accessible and offered at all times to every patient, in any and all situations. EVERY. SINGLE. TIME.
---
| | | [**Donate today to help me fight to keep reproductive care legal and safe.**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7dNn29s4D/c?w=1Xhdn6HH1q8UdlywMzGIrtl2AoZRRivdEgrfQ945eNk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDM_cmVmY29kZT1wcm9jaG9pY2VlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MjUwIiwiciI6IjFjNGMwNWQ3LTFkNGEtNGEyMy1lOTNiLWQ1NzQzNmUyMTk0MiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)

clean_body: When it comes to being "Pro Choice" | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and th | | Can't see this message? | | | | | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON! | | | | When it comes to being "Pro Choice" | | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and their access to care. No one has a right to stand between them and the choices they can make about their own healthcare. This is not a stance I take lightly, it stems from a decision I had to make on behalf of my wife and I. To say that she would not be alive today without unfettered access to that care is the absolute truth, not hyperbole. On October 25th, 2012, my wife lay bleeding on a hospital bed. She was 20 weeks pregnant with our second child, a little girl we would name Addison, and had suffered a placental abruption. The long and short of the tale is she was hemorrhaging blood faster than her dedicated healthcare team could replace it. | | | | | I was informed of two options - I could hope and pray for a miracle while my wife and unborn child bled out, or they could induce labor, saving Amber (my wife) and we would be able hold our daughter ( Addison ) as she faded over the next few hours. Time slowed to a crawl, and in that agonizing instant I considered every possibly conceivable outcome. Praying for a “miracle” wasn’t an option while my wife lay at death’s door. The choice was clear. I had to save my wife and we could hold our daughter while she faded. The Supreme Court decided to protect a woman’s right to choose on January 22nd, 1973. (Roe V Wade) Since that adjudication, that decision has been attacke. It has been dissected and challenged time and time again from every conceivable angle. Roe V Wade was not simply a judgment in favor of a person’s right to bodily autonomy. It allows educated healthcare professionals and informed families the option to choose a treatment that aligns with all of the factors they face, in ANY GIVEN HEALTHCARE SITUATION. There is no doubt that the drug (Pitocin) administered to my wife was done in her best interest, and as such saved her life. However, that drug has come under scrutiny in relation to labor induced terminations.Medicine is by far an imperfect science, and it is impossible to foresee every probability. With this ideal in mind, there can be no uncrossable line in the potential care of anyone, in any conceivable situation. No line can be drawn that covers any and all eventualities. No Doctor, no Nurse, no physicians assistant should hold sway over judgement of care at any point. That is why all potential avenues of reproductive care must be accessible and offered at all times to every patient, in any and all situations. EVERY. SINGLE. name: Jim Jordan
subject: No. Vaccine. Mandates.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58454735:690uiV2N9:m:1:3253819041:929C2E9C9FED2ECA7683000E68853D51:r)
---

Peter,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58454735:690uiV2N9:m:1:3253819041:929C2E9C9FED2ECA7683000E68853D51:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58454735:690uiV2N9:m:1:3253819041:929C2E9C9FED2ECA7683000E68853D51:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 13th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58454735:690uiV2N9:m:1:3253819041:929C2E9C9FED2ECA7683000E68853D51:r)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**
**Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58454735:690uiV2N9:m:1:3253819041:929C2E9C9FED2ECA7683000E68853D51:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58454735:690uiV2N9:m:1:3253819041:929C2E9C9FED2ECA7683000E68853D51:r)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58454735:690uiV2N9:m:1:3253819041:929C2E9C9FED2ECA7683000E68853D51:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? name: Rachel Dyer, Hala for Virginia
subject: Just Announced: Join Hala Ayala and Laphonza Butler for a Virtual Celebration on Oct. 12!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala for Virginia
body:
EMILY’s List, Higher Heights for America, and more come together to celebrate women in politics and Hala Ayala's historic race
Dear Peter,
I wanted to reach out to invite you to an exciting virtual reception honoring **Hala Ayala** , Democratic Nominee for Lt. Governor in Virginia, on **October 12th** at **8 pm**. Hala is a single mom who knows what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet. Against the odds, she built a career as a cybersecurity specialist, and decided after the 2016 elections that enough was enough: she needed to run for office to make a difference in her community.
Now, Hala is in one of the most important races in the country this November, giving Virginia the opportunity to elect the first woman of color **EVER** to statewide office. We hope you’ll join us for this event, just **3 weeks before the election**, to support Hala and her historic campaign.
This reception will feature special guest **Laphonza Butler** , the president of EMILY’s List. Additionally, we’re thrilled to partner with some amazing organizations: the **Democratic Lieutenant Governors Association, Higher Heights for America, National Organization of Women VA, Virginia’s List, Women of Color Coalition and many more!**
You can RSVP to Emily Maercklein at emily@halaforvirginia.com or (518) 410-4623, or sign up **[online](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36922042/309541942/280695495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQxOGU2Ni1kMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVC2f8MFBrkIoz7aY8-cvM_fihmtvKnM5cSUKh2nOj8=)**. Alternatively, you can mail a check to Hala for Virginia at P.O. Box 7434, Woodbridge, VA 22195. If you're unable to attend the event, please consider contributing in lieu of attendance.
Thank you, and I hope to see you there on October 12th!
Onwards,
Rachel Dyer
Finance Director | Hala for Virginia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36922043/309541943/280695495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQxOGU2Ni1kMjIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVC2f8MFBrkIoz7aY8-cvM_fihmtvKnM5cSUKh2nOj8=)

Paid for by Hala for Virginia
Hala for Virginia
P.O. Box 7434
Woodbridge, VA 22195
United States

Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

subject: Louis DeJoy GONE

body:
Will you let us know you CONDEMN Louis DeJoy and his reckless attacks on the post office?

| | | **MSNBC BREAKING:
USPS advances plan to make mail delivery permanently slower**
---

We're OUTRAGED:

Breaking reports are revealing that Trump's hand-picked postmaster general, Louis DeJoy, is making the USPS even _**SLOWER**_ and more expensive than it was before.

We refuse to sit idly by while he undermines this vital public service.

[**So quickly: Will you let us know you CONDEMN Louis DeJoy and his reckless attacks on the post office?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6g_gEB_)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3YAYyT-)
---

We're LIVID.

In just over a year, Donald Trump's hand-picked postmaster general, Louis DeJoy, has caused **OUTRAGEOUS** damage to our vital Post Office:

_**FIRST, **he SABOTAGED mail-in voting for the GOP's political benefit._

_**THEN,** he unveiled a plan to ruthlessly cut costs and restrict service._

_**NOW,** breaking reports are revealing his plan will cause **PERMANENTLY** slower and more expensive mail deliveries._

**We refuse to sit idly by while Trump 's crony at the USPS continues to degrade this essential public service.**

[**So we 're calling on 10,000 grassroots Democrats to take action and let us know they CONDEMN Louis DeJoy's horrific attacks on our Post Office. Can we count on your feedback before midnight?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)

Thank you,

DCCC

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: I can’t stop worrying about this ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36923518/309545478/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.7_TM_10M&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTljOC1kYTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dtpm2Fj8Fpbp-4zoJn5Zc4JHHL0QeRCJ6K8uj7u_dpQ=)

| | I can’t stop worrying about this, Derek.

I just met with my team and they let me know that the initial totals from early voting are low — really low.

**They’re saying Democratic enthusiasm is way down — that voters just don’t get how bad this will be for Virginia and our country if Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump win.**

**Derek, we urgently need to launch our voter outreach and mobilization efforts into high gear.**

_**[So I am asking: will you chip in $30 right now to help fuel our early vote outreach efforts? We’ve got to hit tomorrow night’s $250,000 goal so we have the resources we need to take our message to every corner of the Commonwealth.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36923519/309545479/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.7_TM_10M&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTljOC1kYTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dtpm2Fj8Fpbp-4zoJn5Zc4JHHL0QeRCJ6K8uj7u_dpQ=)**_

Derek, the freedom to vote is the most important element of our democracy — it’s why I fought so hard as governor to expand and defend voting rights for those who were disenfranchised.

_But now, I’m running against a far-right extremist who has peddled Trump’s lies about the 2020 election being stolen. Worse, he’s pushing ways to make voting harder for many Virginians._

It’s wrong, and the only way to stick it to this guy is to use the power of democracy to stop him from winning this race in the first place.

_**[So right now, please chip in $30 to my campaign so we can Get Out the Vote and defend our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36923520/309545480/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.7_TM_10M&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTljOC1kYTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dtpm2Fj8Fpbp-4zoJn5Zc4JHHL0QeRCJ6K8uj7u_dpQ=)**_

Thank you,

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36923521/309545481/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.7_TM_10M&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTljOC1kYTIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dtpm2Fj8Fpbp-4zoJn5Zc4JHHL0QeRCJ6K8uj7u_dpQ=)**
---

Arlington, VA 22215

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=98faac1b08c24ce1b2570d10be361817&_e=1Yx_LuqBUDZAcMWICVQ-P1MEfNilnSlHm74JqDEQEY1Mi4IVhtv3kEcAmuqnOT8QPaMewXfRAAATGcZRDLHshIK8-k87StO_o9PHExInwV35OtI4GL77hDe-oPQrPLv1nbQYqZoQBDM_m3NYJdBxSLSvE4hnexw83SpE8xKn2YL0hcnptVgD2dEnKWVrUAnb1UOd0nYAjrI6qw9bMToJBNdAvH6ozGYQsvDpFZS0aWpUvR2NqLQnLl0f_fVhYmBT722lRSNTFxtDMDbQy_sW1_jYPgpFrR-7haN4OHAd3USlte2bZtSHQn6UpruI5-KxAU5fp_OtKJMdfAe2di3LwBXrVZmQXEYklqFlWmID0-qTIJL-SfSiAWhYMkZTWTj5qOXJbhPXle0WcbrPdY2u7bjcVkTkamoVOqPnk7f8C9PUUV9_4Y6X-KD7TCDyXSEeTr8uBWWgtJNifK-PNTnsHDRhri_67RvM2Qi4Ufs94Dg%3D)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

My career took me all over the country. name: =?utf-8?Q?Allison=20Russo?=
subject: Exactly ONE MONTH until Election Day
body:
We don't have any time to wait, | | | |
---
| | | Hey *"FNAME|* -- We’re officially _just one month out_ from Election Day, and we are doubling down on our efforts to reach as many voters as possible in this home stretch. **I’m going to share our three key focus areas for the final 31 days of this election, but first I have to ask: can you volunteer with Team Russo this month?**
---
|
---
| [TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7a527b59a8&e=400a181d5a "TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS")
---
| Research shows that field programs are especially important in special elections, where turnout is typically low and there is not incumbency advantage. But we can't take advantage of the unique dynamics of this special election without _**your**_ help. **We know this race is going to come down to the wire, so we’re laser-focused on three key areas of our strategy to help us pull off a win:

→ Delivering Allison’s message across the district:** We are airing ads on TV to make sure that voters across the district hear our case to elect Allison and explain why her coal lobbyist opponent is the wrong choice for OH-15.

** → Turning out our voter base: **Early voting begins this week, so we’re working to make sure everyone we know who supports Allison is fired up and ready to cast their ballot in this special election.

** → Leaving it all on the field: **We will be knocking doors and calling voters all the way up until polls close in order to have direct conversations about how much is on the line in this election.

, we know that by staying focused and hustling hard, we can pull off an incredible victory right here in OH-15.** But this grassroots team rests at the core of our strategy, so we can’t do any of this without you.** Will you sign up to volunteer in whatever you can now and help us flip this seat blue in just one month?
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=22afebda76&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0f19a38a1d&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"

RSVP: [Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d56604b257&e=400a181d5a) | [Pickerington](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=51d6e4fe66&e=400a181d5a) | [Hilliard](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=63aa792a96&e=400a181d5a) | [Lancaster](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=bd81b5a845&e=400a181d5a) | [Athens](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=159f2f3586&e=400a181d5a) | [London](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=45e86a179c&e=400a181d5a) | [UA](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=37f41abd29&e=400a181d5a) | [Nelsonville](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fc164c4c31&e=400a181d5a) | [Grandview](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=35c711d47f&e=400a181d5a)

Make calls with Rural Voters for Russo and United Rural Democrats about the upcoming OH-15 special election! We have a mission: reach out to the folks who share our values in every corner of this district. This phone bank targets rural voters who haven't yet made up their mind about the upcoming election.

Every Monday and Wednesday evening, we hold Zoom training sessions for first-time Russo phone bankers. Once you have gone through this training and have all the materials you'll need, you are welcome to make calls throughout the week, Monday-Friday from 4pm-8:30pm.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Allison=20Russo?=
subject: Exactly ONE MONTH until Election Day
body:
We don't have any time to wait, | | | |
---
| | | Hey -- We’re officially _just one month out_ from Election Day, and we are doubling down on our efforts to reach as many voters as possible in this home stretch. **I’m going to share our three key focus areas for the final 31 days of this election, but first I have to ask: can you volunteer with Team Russo this month?**
---
|
---
| [TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=896ea05502&e=400a181d5a "TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS")
---
| Research shows that field programs are especially important in special elections, where turnout is typically low and there is not incumbency advantage. But we can't take advantage of the unique dynamics of this special election without _**your**_ help. **We know this race is going to come down to the wire, so we’re laser-focused on three key areas of our strategy to help us pull off a win:

→ Delivering Allison’s message across the district:** We are airing ads on TV to make sure that voters across the district hear our case to elect Allison and explain why her coal lobbyist opponent is the wrong choice for OH-15.

** → Turning out our voter base: **Early voting begins this week, so we’re working to make sure everyone we know who supports Allison is fired up and ready to cast their ballot in this special election.

** → Leaving it all on the field: **We will be knocking doors and calling voters all the way up until polls close in order to have direct conversations about how much is on the line in this election.

, we know that by staying focused and hustling hard, we can pull off an incredible victory right here in OH-15.** But this grassroots team rests at the core of our strategy, so we can’t do any of this without you.** Will you sign up to volunteer in whatever you can now and help us flip this seat blue in just one month?
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=43f9ede73d&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6df1ce850a&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"

RSVP: [Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d85d4565fb&e=400a181d5a) | [Pickerington](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4a034c0800&e=400a181d5a) | [Hilliard](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=cbcd751313&e=400a181d5a) | [Lancaster](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=8e4c926bd9&e=400a181d5a) | [Athens](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b1bc82a74f&e=400a181d5a) | [London](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a4b33b3fda&e=400a181d5a) | [UA](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f35730d90b&e=400a181d5a) | [Nelsonville](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=82f412dd87&e=400a181d5a) | [Grandview](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e5df9bb4b5&e=400a181d5a)
|

name: James Carville
subject: VA is Trump's last stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Trump’s endorsement is a wake up call for all of us.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36926148/309573722/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.8_JC_10N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODBmNTRhNC1lZDIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r_kT6HRynVLrZjd2R_AtuFYqzIbGXDSxT7aAEX5_Hs=)

| | Derek,

I’m going to level with you: Trump-backed candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, poses the biggest threat to Virginia’s progress in a generation.

If he wins, that’s the ball game. Everything from Virginia’s health care to our freedom to vote will be in danger.

Derek, we have to make sure Terry McAuliffe has everything he needs to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin.

**[It's already October, Derek. We're running out of time to stop Trump and Youngkin -- can you chip in right now and do your part?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36926149/309573723/1097049879?refcode=20211002.8_JC_10N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODBmNTRhNC1lZDIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r_kT6HRynVLrZjd2R_AtuFYqzIbGXDSxT7aAEX5_Hs=)**

Here’s another sad fact. Youngkin winning ain’t just bad for Virginia, it’s a nightmare for America.

Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin and Glenn is shouting that endorsement from the rooftops. In fact, Youngkin is so much like Trump that folks are starting to call him “Glenn Trumpkin.”

Look, I don’t care what you call him. All I care about is what election experts are calling Virginia: a toss-up and 2021’s most important race.

Derek, we worked too damn hard to fire Donald Trump for us to let him resurrect his political career by helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s next Governor.

**[I’m counting on you to do your part to stop them. Youngkin is planning on spending $75 million of his own money to win and any contribution, no matter the amount, would be a huge help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36926150/309573724/1097049879?refcode=20211002.8_JC_10N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODBmNTRhNC1lZDIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r_kT6HRynVLrZjd2R_AtuFYqzIbGXDSxT7aAEX5_Hs=)**

Thanks,

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36926151/309573725/-2023814932?refcode=20211002.8_JC_10N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODBmNTRhNC1lZDIzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r_kT6HRynVLrZjd2R_AtuFYqzIbGXDSxT7aAEX5_Hs=)

subject: 🚨 Important Announcement 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Please Open Immediately

| [](https://links.move.gop/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=8f9958d191044b0c8709a403303f8eb7&_e=C4LnTkMWO6XtsRSNZ_4yo_a7iVHQDKt-f8yyXPCvEx3WGiHXZswHM5_eEFE-Ho5TziWEhOy2UhL5p4zBeHi3jtxpb13S3j2JrQp9cba8i3VTRUN8dUe37tlUaMMlzHrowRKUZcbb_b0m-z84p9tUcPCe1hIUHbtaJzlBrcP1VyVIN1ec8WRbLJlc8vQL-Xb9p5oqbCBLavvvdloN6NXm1A57rCNu9BeIZZnNwpexL6L6CezL9PJ2iyjiqxcJ1xj7C1vODSRL5GJZ7FPOwh1T3hSQJVfK2ihru4kSkhZWTeQjZoqyg4y_q2NUPTZ1hDoXy9-tzpT0rLsPDcXEYqTuXZXDUIOWiqeyM4ADIKrZkcdAdb_52sGKQNMOTP6ETkWXPka8gBywBCOes6BvPfykl93uYEAeHf7gpSiiW357gZTCuFbF60IrZB6fCaBRTvd07OuO5kPmbK8TFx5mUjU9BPOBusUPNRXQ0pNR0kzt7Xsz2NU1LxJsXmbmsU8fvIaO)
---
Friends:

**I needed you to hear this from me personally:_I am running for re-election to continue representing the people of Iowa in the U.S Senate._ **
**_As we get the new campaign underway, Barbara and I want to share some of our favorite moments from previous campaigns. Check out the mash-up we made for you._** [](https://links.move.gop/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=8f9958d191044b0c8709a403303f8eb7&_e=C4LnTkMWO6XtsRSNZ_4yo_a7iVHQDKt-f8yyXPCvEx3WGiHXZswHM5_eEFE-Ho5TziWEhOy2UhL5p4zBeHi3jtxpb13S3j2JrQp9cba8i3VTRUN8dUe37tlUaMMlzHrowRKUZcbb_b0m-z84p9tUcPCe1hIUHbtaJzlBrcP1VyVIN1ec8WRbLJlc8vQL-Xb9p5oqbCBLavvvdloN6NXm1A57rCNu9BeIZZnNwpexL6L6CezL9PJ2iyjiqxcJ1xj7C1vODSRL5GJZ7FPOwh1T3hSQJVfK2ihru4kSkhZWTeSyAOhWtDmC6cU76LzocTKW7k6YugebcrLVHHtiD_p9wIUyikWH9NgdreAXvuce_MImybb_GGluoxEe_v2H5On_5S9wST2BHshbp6ADiar5SpDgmieTU4LNSIPYbavSS0YjADlmgVlG9lzY-S4I5kTcsFKDlAPwyeN8Os26OEf0NsQfD7BnCVRQ0BQrRoF0A_1HE1Busi91ze68YnvzJd5V)

_Representing the people of Iowa is a great honor._ It is a privilege to listen to your concerns, and make our communities and our country stronger than ever. I am thankful for your support and want you to know that I never take that for granted. In these uncertain times of chaos and polarization, Iowa needs steady and effective leadership you can count on. We’ve accomplished a lot but there’s more work to do. Winning Iowa is key to taking back control of the United States Senate. We need to change course and get America back on track with Republican leadership.

As a farmer, I live life by a simple code: you keep working until the job is done. When you look at Washington today, you can see there is still a lot of work to do. I’m committed to making our country a better place for our kids and grandkids. I’m working as hard as ever.

**[I’m asking for your support so I can continue to bring common sense conservative values to Washington.](https://links.move.gop/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=8f9958d191044b0c8709a403303f8eb7&_e=C4LnTkMWO6XtsRSNZ_4yo_a7iVHQDKt-f8yyXPCvEx3WGiHXZswHM5_eEFE-Ho5TziWEhOy2UhL5p4zBeHi3jtxpb13S3j2JrQp9cba8i3VTRUN8dUe37tlUaMMlzHrowRKUZcbb_b0m-z84p9tUcPCe1hIUHbtaJzlBrcP1VyVIN1ec8WRbLJlc8vQL-Xb9p5oqbCBLavvvdloN6NXm1A57rCNu9BeIZZnNwpexL6L6CezL9PJ2iyjiqxcJ1xj7C1vODSRL5GJZ7FPOwh1T3hSQJVfK2ihru4kSkhZWTeT5HdnKA2oGQg_Vtnm81bxkpJoBz0_Zl3hcD_6S-0aqrK0UY1-3uQlrfdFAFW-bOM6IHKsNTy_u16XByiwEPnz48y7iJ2VqUIeOx49YNwU3YQoSjVqPLi-UHGIQoKESEQZ493NABQ_AWjzhffDR_flw9whsh0nAzpAId4rPi99sWmJZw6c-Y7UOCq1ymS3nUvXJud_WtTCio1CeSnpfNsDZ)**

I work hard to earn your trust and Iowans count on me to do what I say I’ll do. That’s exactly what I’ve done, and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. What you see is what you get.

So, I hope you will come running with me in this race. I know I’m geared up and ready to take on the Radical Left, are you?
| [**RUN WITH ME**](https://links.move.gop/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=8f9958d191044b0c8709a403303f8eb7&_e=C4LnTkMWO6XtsRSNZ_4yo_a7iVHQDKt-f8yyXPCvEx3WGiHXZswHM5_eEFE-Ho5TziWEhOy2UhL5p4zBeHi3jtxpb13S3j2JrQp9cba8i3VTRUN8dUe37tlUaMMlzHrowRKUZcbb_b0m-z84p9tUcPCe1hIUHbtaJzlBrcP1VyVIN1ec8WRbLJlc8vQL-Xb9p5oqbCBLavvvdloN6NXm1A57rCNu9BeIZZnNwpexL6L6CezL9PJ2iyjiqxcJ1xj7C1vODSRL5GJZ7FPOwh1T3hSQJVfK2ihru4kSkhZWTeQLpmQJ6G1K1jXfJVqCYr2Gr-t2b12_NuIrWEWMySpgDG7Mb8ea1kBTbKD5TE-iupcsH9UGRaMRMhypm7HuaszVz9YG7hlbvDbp2xa82mwHZRfymscG7kK0dxufKASMHI4Xr-Rp-1IGgkEFx_3bNS7kwmscMZV7TErxV4QGGcSFyQmxrwK5zMXSHIcA3bVBg1cfkIq7C3MwLijCfN9cF6EQ)
---

clean_body: Please Open Immediately | Friends: I needed you to hear this from me personally:I am running for re-election to continue representing the people of Iowa in the U.S Senate. As we get the new campaign underway, Barbara and I want to share some of our favorite moments from previous campaigns. Check out the mash-up we made for you. Representing the people of Iowa is a great honor. It is a privilege to listen to your concerns, and make our communities and our country stronger than ever. I am thankful for your support and want you to know that I never take that for granted. In these uncertain times of chaos and polarization, Iowa needs steady and effective leadership you can count on. We’ve accomplished a lot but there’s more work to do. Winning Iowa is key to taking back control of the United States Senate. We need to change course and get America back on track with Republican leadership. As a farmer, I live life by a simple code: you keep working until the job is done. When you look at Washington today, you can see there is still a lot of work to do. I’m committed to making our country a better place for our kids and grandkids. I’m working as hard as ever. I work hard to earn your trust and Iowans count on me to do what I say I’ll do. That’s exactly what I’ve done, and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. What you see is what you get. So, I hope you will come running with me in this race. I know I’m geared up and ready to take on the Radical Left, are you? | 2022 is about to be a big year. | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" I love my work and I will always work harder than anyone on your behalf. Thank you and God Bless, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | The 2020 presidential election had turnout thanks to Vote by Mail! Lawmakers should be expanding voting rights right now... not rigging elections just to win seats. We should ALL be standing behind Vote by Mail efforts to help everyone reliably vote. | | | We really appreciate your response! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you.
